30906.title: Inflationary Effects of Fiscal Support to Households and Firms
30906.zh_title: 对家庭和企业财政支持的通货膨胀效应
30906.authors: Galina Hale, John C. Leer, Fernanda Nechio
30906.abstract: Fiscal support measures in response to the COVID-19 pandemic varied in their targeted beneficiaries. Relying on variability across 10 large economies, we study differences in the inflationary effects of fiscal support measures targeting consumers or businesses. Because conventional measures of real activity were distorted, we control for the underlying state of the real economy using households sentiment data. We find that fiscal support measures to consumers, but not firms, had inflationary effects that manifested 5 weeks following the announcement and peaked at 12 weeks. The magnitude of the effect was larger in an environment of improving consumer sentiment.
30906.zh_abstract: 针对COVID-19疫情的财政支持措施在目标受益者上有所不同。利用10个大型经济体的差异性，我们研究了针对消费者或企业的财政支持措施在通货膨胀效应上的差异。由于传统的实际经济活动指标被扭曲，我们使用家庭情绪数据来控制实体经济的潜在状态。我们发现，针对消费者的财政支持措施（而非针对企业的措施）具有通货膨胀效应，这种效应在公告后5周显现，并在12周达到峰值。在消费者情绪改善的环境下，这种效应的规模更大。

30905.title: The Marginal Disutility from Corruption in Social Programs: Evidence from Program Administrators and Beneficiaries
30905.zh_title: 社会项目中腐败的边际负效用：来自项目管理员和受益者的证据
30905.authors: Arya Gaduh, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken
30905.abstract: Concerns about fraud in welfare programs common arguments worldwide against such programs. We conducted a survey experiment with over 28,000 welfare program administrators and over 19,000 beneficiaries in Indonesia to elicit the ‘marginal disutility from corruption,’ i.e., the trade-between more generous social assistance and losses due to corruption and fraud. Merely mentioning corruption reduced perceived program success, equivalent to distributing more than 20 percent less aid. However, respondents were not sensitive to the amount of corruption—respondents were willing to trade off $\$2$ of additional losses for an additional $\$1$ distributed to beneficiaries. Program administrators and beneficiaries had similar assessments.
30905.zh_abstract: 对福利项目欺诈的担忧是全球范围内反对此类项目的常见论点。我们在印度尼西亚对超过28,000名福利项目管理员和超过19,000名受益者进行了一项调查实验，以引出“腐败的边际负效用”，即在更慷慨的社会援助与腐败和欺诈造成的损失之间的权衡。仅仅提及腐败就会降低感知的项目成功率，相当于减少了超过20%的援助分配。然而，受访者对腐败金额并不敏感——受访者愿意为每额外分配给受益者1美元而承受2美元的额外损失。项目管理员和受益者的评估相似。

30904.title: Trading Places: Mobility Responses of Native and Foreign-Born Adults to the China Trade Shock
30904.zh_title: 互换位置：本土和外国出生成年人对中国贸易冲击的流动性反应
30904.authors: David Autor, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson
30904.abstract: Previous research finds that the greater geographic mobility of foreign than native-born workers following economic shocks helps to facilitate local labor market adjustment to shifting regional economic conditions. We examine the role that immigration may have played in enabling U.S. commuting zones to respond to manufacturing job loss caused by import competition from China. Although population headcounts of the foreign-born fell by more than those of the native-born in regions exposed to the China trade shock, the overall contribution of immigration to labor market adjustment in this episode was small. Because most U.S. immigrants arrived in the country after manufacturing regions were already mature, few took up jobs in industries that would later see increased import penetration from China. The foreign-born share of the working-age population in regions with high trade exposure was only three-fifths that in regions with low exposure. Immigration thus appears more likely to aid adjustment to cyclical shocks, in which job loss occurs in regions that had recent booms in hiring, rather than facilitating adjustment to secular regional decline, in which hiring booms occurred in the more distant past.
30904.zh_abstract: 先前的研究发现，在经济冲击后，外国出生工人的地理流动性高于本土出生工人，这有助于促进地方劳动力市场对区域经济状况变化的调整。我们考察了移民在帮助美国通勤区应对由中国进口竞争导致的制造业岗位流失方面可能发挥的作用。尽管在遭受中国贸易冲击的地区，外国出生人口数量下降幅度大于本土出生人口，但移民在这一事件中对劳动力市场调整的总体贡献很小。因为大多数美国移民是在制造业地区已经成熟之后才抵达美国的，很少有人从事后来中国进口渗透率增加的行业。在贸易暴露度高的地区，外国出生人口占劳动年龄人口的比例仅为低暴露度地区的五分之三。因此，移民似乎更可能有助于应对周期性冲击（即岗位流失发生在近期招聘繁荣的地区），而不是促进对长期区域衰退（即招聘繁荣发生在更久远的过去）的调整。
30904.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, F14, F16, J23, J31, L60, O47, R12, R23

30903.title: Peak-Hour Road Congestion Pricing: Experimental Evidence and Equilibrium Implications
30903.zh_title: 高峰时段道路拥堵定价：实验证据与均衡含义
30903.abstract: Developing country megacities suffer from severe road traffic congestion, yet the level of congestion is not a direct measure of equilibrium inefficiency. I study the peak-hour traffic congestion equilibrium in Bangalore. To measure travel preferences, I use a model of departure time choice to design a field experiment with congestion pricing policies and implement it using precise GPS data. Commuter responses in the experiment reveal moderate schedule inflexibility and a high value of time. I then show that in Bangalore, traffic density has a moderate and linear impact on travel delay. My policy simulations with endogenous congestion indicate that optimal congestion charges would lead to a small reduction in travel times, and small commuter welfare gains. This result is driven primarily by the shape of the congestion externality. Overall, these results suggest limited commuter welfare benefits from peak-spreading traffic policies in cities like Bangalore.
30903.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的大城市饱受严重道路交通拥堵之苦，然而拥堵水平并非均衡无效率的直接衡量指标。我研究了班加罗尔的高峰时段交通拥堵均衡。为了衡量出行偏好，我使用了一个出发时间选择模型来设计一个包含拥堵定价政策的实地实验，并使用精确的GPS数据实施该实验。实验中通勤者的反应揭示了中度的日程不灵活性和较高的时间价值。然后我表明，在班加罗尔，交通密度对出行延误有适度且线性的影响。我的包含内生拥堵的政策模拟表明，最优拥堵收费将导致出行时间的小幅减少和通勤者福利的小幅增加。这一结果主要由拥堵外部性的形状驱动。总体而言，这些结果表明，在班加罗尔这样的城市，错峰交通政策带来的通勤者福利收益有限。

30902.title: Exposure to Economic Distress during Pregnancy and Birth Outcomes
30902.zh_title: 孕期经济困境暴露与出生结果
30902.authors: Mevlude Akbulut-Yuksel, Seyit M. Cilasun, Erdal Tekin, Belgi Turan
30902.abstract: This paper uses the severe economic crisis in Turkey in 2008-2009 as a quasi-experiment to evaluate the impact of worsening economic conditions during pregnancy on birthweight. Using birth history data from the 2008 and 2013 waves of the Demographic Health Surveys, we find that the economic crisis resulted in decreased birthweight in Turkey, especially impacting infants born to mothers with lower educational levels. Furthermore, a procyclical relationship exists between provincial income levels and the birthweight of infants born to mothers with lower levels of education. However, this relationship is only statistically significant during the crisis period. These results highlight how economic constraints on mothers with lower socio-economic status during economic crises can negatively affect birth outcomes. Furthermore, we examine shifts in fertility behavior and find a decrease in childbirth rates during the crisis, particularly in economically disadvantaged provinces. In line with this decrease in fertility, we also observe a reduced propensity to seek an abortion during the crisis period. Overall, these findings underscore the importance of understanding how economic crises affect infant health and the need for targeted interventions to support vulnerable populations, as well as addressing underlying socio-economic disparities to mitigate their impact on infant well-being.
30902.zh_abstract: 本文利用土耳其2008-2009年严重的经济危机作为准实验，评估孕期经济状况恶化对出生体重的影响。使用2008年和2013年人口健康调查的生育史数据，我们发现经济危机导致土耳其出生体重下降，尤其对教育水平较低的母亲所生婴儿影响更大。此外，省级收入水平与低教育水平母亲所生婴儿的出生体重之间存在顺周期关系。然而，这种关系仅在危机期间具有统计显著性。这些结果凸显了经济危机期间对低社会经济地位母亲的经济约束如何对出生结果产生负面影响。此外，我们考察了生育行为的变化，发现危机期间生育率下降，尤其是在经济弱势省份。与生育率下降相一致，我们还观察到危机期间寻求堕胎的倾向降低。总体而言，这些发现强调了理解经济危机如何影响婴儿健康的重要性，以及需要有针对性的干预措施来支持弱势群体，并解决潜在的社会经济不平等以减轻其对婴儿福祉的影响。

30901.title: An 'Austrian' Model of Global Value Chains
30901.zh_title: 全球价值链的“奥地利”模型
30901.abstract: I develop a stylized model of multi-stage production in which the time length of each stage is endogenously determined. Letting the production process mature for a longer period of time increases labor productivity, but it comes at the cost of higher working capital needs for firms. Under autarky, countries with lower interest rates feature longer production processes, higher labor productivity, and higher wages. In a free trade equilibrium, countries with lower interest rates specialize in relatively ‘time intensive’ stages in global value chains (GVCs). Yet, if free trade brings about interest rate equalization, wages are also equalized and the pattern of trade is instead shaped by capital intensity and capital abundance, regardless of the time intensity of the various stages. Reductions in trade costs lead to patterns of specialization associated with higher amounts of vertical specialization in world trade. A worldwide decline in interest rates similarly fosters an increase in the share of GVC trade in world trade. The framework also sheds light on the role of trade credit and trade finance in shaping international specialization.
30901.zh_abstract: 我开发了一个多阶段生产的简化模型，其中每个阶段的时间长度是内生的。让生产过程成熟更长时间会提高劳动生产率，但代价是企业需要更多的营运资金。在自给自足条件下，利率较低的国家拥有更长的生产过程、更高的劳动生产率和更高的工资。在自由贸易均衡中，利率较低的国家专门从事全球价值链中相对“时间密集型”的阶段。然而，如果自由贸易导致利率均等化，工资也会均等化，贸易模式则由资本密集度和资本丰裕度决定，而无论各阶段的时间密集度如何。贸易成本的降低会导致与全球贸易中更高垂直专业化程度相关的专业化模式。全球范围内的利率下降同样会促进全球价值链贸易占世界贸易份额的增加。该框架还揭示了贸易信贷和贸易融资在塑造国际专业化中的作用。

30900.title: The Trickling Up of Excess Savings
30900.authors: Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
30900.abstract: We provide a simple framework connecting the distribution of excess savings across households to the dynamics of aggregate demand. Deficit-financed fiscal transfers generate excess savings. The poorest households with the highest MPCs spend down their excess savings the fastest, increasing other households’ incomes and their excess savings. This leads to a long-lasting increase in aggregate demand until, ultimately, excess savings have “trickled up” to the richest savers with the lowest MPCs, raising wealth inequality.
30900.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个简单的框架，将家庭间超额储蓄的分布与总需求动态联系起来。赤字融资的财政转移支付产生了超额储蓄。拥有最高边际消费倾向的最贫困家庭最快地花掉他们的超额储蓄，从而增加了其他家庭的收入和他们的超额储蓄。这导致总需求持续增长，直到最终超额储蓄“涓滴”到拥有最低边际消费倾向的最富裕储蓄者手中，从而加剧了财富不平等。

30927.title: Do Conflict of Interests Disclosures Work? Evidence from Citations in Medical Journals
30927.zh_title: 利益冲突披露有效吗？来自医学期刊引用的证据
30927.authors: Christian Leuz, Anup Malani, Maximilian Muhn, Laszlo Jakab
30927.abstract: Financial ties between drug companies and medical researchers are thought to bias studies published in medical journals. To enable readers to account for such bias, most medical journals require authors to disclose potential conflicts of interest. We examine whether disclosure reduces article citations, indicating a discount. A challenge to estimating this effect is selection as drug companies may seek out higher quality authors. Our analysis confirms this positive association. Including observable controls for article and author quality attenuates but does not eliminate this relation. We perform three tests. First, we show that the positive association is weaker for review articles, which are more susceptible to bias. Second, we examine article recommendations to family physicians among articles that are a priori more homogenous in quality. We find a significantly negative association between disclosure and expert recommendations, consistent with discounting. Third, we conduct an analysis within author and article, exploiting journal policy changes that result in conflict disclosure by an author. We examine the effect of this disclosure on citations to a previously published article by the same author. This analysis reveals a negative citation effect. Overall, our evidence is consistent with the notion that other researchers discount articles with disclosed conflicts.
30927.zh_abstract: 制药公司与医学研究人员之间的财务关系被认为会偏倚医学期刊发表的研究。为使读者能够考虑这种偏倚，大多数医学期刊要求作者披露潜在的利益冲突。我们考察披露是否会减少文章引用，从而表明存在折扣。估计这一效应的挑战在于选择性问题，因为制药公司可能寻求更高质量的作者。我们的分析证实了这种正相关关系。纳入文章和作者质量的可观测控制变量会减弱但不会消除这种关系。我们进行了三项检验。首先，我们表明，对于更容易受偏倚影响的综述文章，这种正相关关系较弱。其次，我们在先验质量更同质的文章中，考察了向家庭医生推荐的文章。我们发现，披露与专家推荐之间存在显著的负相关关系，这与折扣效应一致。第三，我们在作者和文章内部进行分析，利用导致作者披露利益冲突的期刊政策变化。我们考察了这种披露对同一作者先前发表文章引用的影响。该分析揭示了负面的引用效应。总体而言，我们的证据与其他研究者对披露冲突的文章打折扣的观点一致。
30927.meta: Programs：CF, EH, LE；JEL：D83, D84, G18, K20, L51, M40, O31

30926.title: Harm Reduction: When Does It Improve Health, and When Does it Backfire?
30926.zh_title: 减害：何时改善健康，何时适得其反？
30926.abstract: Some harm reduction strategies encourage individuals to switch from a harmful addictive good to a less harmful addictive good; examples include e-cigarettes (substitutes for combustible cigarettes) and methadone and buprenorphine (substitutes for opioids). These have proven to be controversial. Advocates argue that people struggling with addiction benefit because they can switch to a less harmful substance, but opponents argue that this could encourage abstainers to begin using the harm-reduction method or even, eventually, the original addictive good. This paper builds on theories of addiction to model the introduction of a harm reduction method, and demonstrates the conditions under which each side is correct.
30926.zh_abstract: 一些减害策略鼓励个体从有害成瘾品转向危害较小的成瘾品；例如电子烟（可燃香烟的替代品）以及美沙酮和丁丙诺啡（阿片类药物的替代品）。这些策略已被证明存在争议。支持者认为，挣扎于成瘾问题的人可以转而使用危害较小的物质而受益，但反对者认为，这可能会鼓励原本不使用者开始使用减害方法，甚至最终使用原始成瘾品。本文基于成瘾理论，对减害方法的引入进行建模，并论证了每一方观点成立的条件。

30925.title: Which Firms Gain from Digital Advertising? Evidence from a Field Experiment
30925.zh_title: 哪些企业从数字广告中获益？来自实地实验的证据
30925.authors: Weijia Dai, Hyunjin Kim, Michael Luca
30925.abstract: Measuring the returns of advertising opportunities continues to be a challenge for many businesses. We design and run a field experiment in collaboration with Yelp across 18,294 firms in the restaurant industry to understand which types of businesses gain more from digital advertising. We randomly assign 7,209 restaurants to freely receive Yelp’s standard ads package for three months. The scale of the experiment gives us a unique opportunity to assess the heterogeneity in advertising effectiveness across a variety of business attributes. We find that restaurants that receive advertising on Yelp observe on average a 7-19% increase in a wide range of purchase intention outcomes, as well as a 5% increase in customer reviews. We find that gains are heterogeneous across firms, with independent and higher-rated businesses observing larger gains, as well as those with more reviews and higher pre-experiment organic traffic.
30925.zh_abstract: 衡量广告机会的回报对许多企业来说仍然是一个挑战。我们与Yelp合作，在餐饮行业的18294家企业中设计并开展了一项实地实验，以了解哪些类型的企业从数字广告中获益更多。我们随机分配7209家餐厅免费获得Yelp的标准广告套餐三个月。实验的规模为我们评估广告效果在不同企业属性间的异质性提供了独特机会。我们发现，在Yelp上投放广告的餐厅，在一系列购买意愿指标上平均增长了7-19%，同时客户评论数量增加了5%。我们发现，收益在企业间存在异质性，独立经营和评分较高的企业收益更大，评论数量较多以及实验前自然流量较高的企业也是如此。

30924.title: New Institutional Economics and Cliometrics
30924.zh_title: 新制度经济学与计量史学
30924.authors: Eric C. Alston, Lee J. Alston, Bernardo Mueller
30924.abstract: The New Institutional Economics (NIE) has its early roots in Cliometrics. Cliometrics began with a focus on using neoclassical theory to develop and test hypotheses in economic history. But empirical consideration of economic and political development within and across countries is limited, absent consideration of the institutional context. The NIE as applied in economic history first focused on the roles of transaction costs and property rights. From this micro-institutional perspective, the NIE expanded its focus to the role of institutions and norms on economic development as well as how economic forces along with political institutional variance influences outcomes both within and across countries. This involves considering both forces that impede and promote economic and political convergence across countries as well the forces that determine a transition to a new economic or political trajectory altogether. Testing for the determinants of economic and political development is plagued with omitted variables and endogeneity concerns, a constraint which has recently prompted scholars to draw on complexity theory to further supplement the NIE and Cliometrics.
30924.zh_abstract: 新制度经济学（NIE）的早期根源在于计量史学。计量史学最初侧重于运用新古典理论来提出和检验经济史中的假说。但若不考虑制度背景，对国内及跨国经济与政治发展的实证研究就会受到限制。应用于经济史的NIE首先关注交易成本和产权的作用。从这种微观制度视角出发，NIE将其关注点扩展到制度与规范对经济发展的作用，以及经济力量与政治制度差异如何共同影响国内及跨国结果。这涉及考虑阻碍和促进各国经济与政治趋同的力量，以及决定向全新经济或政治轨迹转型的力量。检验经济与政治发展的决定因素受到遗漏变量和内生性问题的困扰，这一限制近期促使学者们借鉴复杂性理论，以进一步补充NIE和计量史学。

30923.title: Bitcoin Mining Meets Wall Street: A Study of Publicly Traded Crypto Mining Companies
30923.zh_title: 比特币挖矿遇上华尔街：对上市加密矿企的研究
30923.abstract: This paper studies the operations and financial valuations of 13 cryptocurrency mining companies that are listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange and have facilities in North America. We find that miners using Texas wind power are offline more than other miners, in a more erratic pattern. Yet, despite having relatively low activity levels, these Texas miners are more profitable than those using more stable sources of energy such as hyrdo power or solar power, as reflected in significantly higher enterprise values. Our model shows that miners using sustainable energy may be more profitable than those using conventional sources, despite the shutdowns, as they benefit from extremely low prices when there is oversupply of sustainable energy (e.g., strong winds). The model also shows that it may be beneficial for the electric utility to offer miners compensation for curtailment of their activity when there is undersupply of energy (e.g. lack of wind), which we also observe in our sample. This compensation further increases profits of the miners. We find a negative and significant beta between crypto mining stocks and an index of electric utilities, suggesting that ownership of a crypto mining company might provide a useful channel for risk management in the electric power industry.
30923.zh_abstract: 本文研究了13家在纳斯达克上市且设施位于北美的加密货币挖矿公司的运营和财务估值。我们发现，使用德克萨斯州风电的矿工比其他矿工离线时间更长，且模式更不稳定。然而，尽管活动水平相对较低，这些德克萨斯州的矿工比使用水电或太阳能等更稳定能源的矿工更盈利，这体现在显著更高的企业价值上。我们的模型表明，使用可持续能源的矿工可能比使用传统能源的矿工更盈利，尽管存在停机，因为他们受益于可持续能源（如强风）供应过剩时的极低价格。该模型还表明，当能源供应不足（如无风）时，电力公司向矿工提供补偿以削减其活动可能是有益的，我们在样本中也观察到了这一点。这种补偿进一步增加了矿工的利润。我们发现加密挖矿股票与电力公用事业指数之间存在显著负贝塔值，这表明持有加密挖矿公司的股份可能为电力行业提供有用的风险管理渠道。
30923.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, ME, PR；JEL：G23, L23, L94

30922.title: Distorted Innovation: Does the Market Get the Direction of Technology Right?
30922.zh_title: 扭曲的创新：市场能否正确引导技术方向？
30922.abstract: In the presence of markup differences, externalities and other social considerations, the equilibrium direction of innovation can be systematically distorted. This paper builds a simple model of endogenous technology, which generalizes existing comparative static results and characterizes potential distortions in the direction of innovation. I show that empirical findings across a number of different areas are consistent with this framework's predictions and I use data from several studies to estimate its key parameters. Combining these numbers with rough estimates of differential externalities and markups, I provide suggestive evidence that equilibrium distortions in the direction of technology can be substantial in the context of industrial automation, health care, and energy, and correcting these distortions could have sizable welfare benefits.
30922.zh_abstract: 在存在加价差异、外部性及其他社会考量的情况下，创新的均衡方向可能被系统性扭曲。本文构建了一个简单的内生技术模型，该模型概括了现有的比较静态结果，并刻画了创新方向上的潜在扭曲。我表明，多个不同领域的实证发现与该框架的预测一致，并利用多项研究的数据估计了其关键参数。将这些数字与差异外部性和加价的粗略估计相结合，我提供了提示性证据，表明在工业自动化、医疗保健和能源领域，技术方向的均衡扭曲可能相当严重，而纠正这些扭曲可能带来可观的福利收益。
30922.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, PR；JEL：C65, J23, J24, L65, O14, O31, O33

30921.title: Back to the 1980s or Not? The Drivers of Inflation and Real Risks in Treasury Bonds
30921.zh_title: 回到1980年代还是并非如此？国债通胀风险与真实风险的驱动因素
30921.abstract: I use nominal and real bond risks as new moments to discipline a New Keynesian asset pricing model, where supply shocks, demand shocks, and monetary policy are the fundamental drivers of inflation. Endogenously time-varying risk premia imply that nominal bond risks—as measured by their stock market beta—are a forward-looking indicator of stagflation risks. Calibrating the model separately for the 1980s and the 2000s, I show that positive nominal bond betas in the 1980s resulted from a “perfect storm” of supply shocks and a reactive monetary policy rule, but not from either supply shocks or monetary policy in isolation.
30921.zh_abstract: 我使用名义和真实债券风险作为新的矩条件来约束一个新凯恩斯主义资产定价模型，其中供给冲击、需求冲击和货币政策是通胀的基本驱动因素。内生时变的风险溢价意味着名义债券风险——以其股票市场贝塔值衡量——是滞胀风险的前瞻性指标。分别针对1980年代和2000年代校准模型后，我表明，1980年代的正名义债券贝塔值是由供给冲击和反应性货币政策规则的“完美风暴”共同导致的，而非供给冲击或货币政策单独作用的结果。
30921.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E0, E31, E40, G10, G12

30920.title: Digital Hermits
30920.authors: Jeanine Miklós-Thal, Avi Goldfarb, Avery M. Haviv, Catherine Tucker
30920.abstract: When a user shares multi-dimensional data about themselves with a firm, the firm learns about the correlations of different dimensions of user data. We incorporate this type of learning into a model of a data market in which a firm acquires data from users with privacy concerns. User data is multi-dimensional, and each user can share no data, only non-sensitive data, or their full data with the firm. As the firm collects more data and becomes better at drawing inferences about a user’s privacy-sensitive data from their non-sensitive data, the share of new users who share no data (“digital hermits”) grows. At the same time, the share of new users who share their full data also grows. The model therefore predicts a polarization of users’ data sharing choices away from non-sensitive data sharing to no sharing and full sharing.
30920.zh_abstract: 当用户向企业分享关于自身的多维数据时，企业会学习用户数据不同维度之间的相关性。我们将这种学习行为纳入一个数据市场模型，在该模型中，企业从有隐私担忧的用户那里获取数据。用户数据是多维的，每个用户可以选择不分享任何数据、仅分享非敏感数据或分享全部数据给企业。随着企业收集更多数据并更擅长从用户的非敏感数据推断其隐私敏感数据，不分享任何数据的新用户（“数字隐士”）比例会增长。同时，分享全部数据的新用户比例也会增长。因此，该模型预测用户的数据分享选择会出现两极分化，从分享非敏感数据转向不分享和分享全部数据。

30919.title: Task Mismatch and Salary Penalties: Evidence from the Biomedical PhD Labor Market
30919.zh_title: 任务错配与薪资惩罚：来自生物医学博士劳动力市场的证据
30919.authors: Holden A. Diethorn, Gerald R. Marschke
30919.abstract: We use the labor market for doctorates in the biomedical sciences, where career dislocation is common, as a case study of skill-task mismatch and its consequences. Using longitudinal, worker-level data on biomedical doctorates, we investigate mismatch as an explanation for the negative pecuniary returns to postdoc training. Our data contain unique worker-level job task information that allows us to compare the skills acquired in the years just after graduation to the tasks required in later employment. Our findings reveal a postdoc salary penalty when task mismatch is high, which is frequent, and a salary premium when skills align with tasks. Differences in accumulated task-specific human capital explain the between-sector heterogeneity in the returns to postdoctoral training, including the large and persistent salary penalties from postdoctoral training in industry, and the penalty overall. Task mismatch as a cost of pursuing risky careers in science and in other fields requiring large upfront investments in task-specific human capital has received little attention in the empirical labor literature.
30919.zh_abstract: 我们以生物医学科学博士的劳动力市场（其中职业错位很常见）作为技能-任务错配及其后果的案例研究。利用生物医学博士的纵向个体层面数据，我们研究错配作为博士后培训负货币回报的解释。我们的数据包含独特的个体层面工作任务信息，使我们能够比较毕业几年后获得的技能与后续就业中所需的任务。我们的发现揭示了当任务错配程度高时（这种情况很常见）存在博士后薪资惩罚，而当技能与任务匹配时则存在薪资溢价。累积的任务特定人力资本差异解释了博士后培训回报的部门间异质性，包括产业界博士后培训带来的巨大且持久的薪资惩罚以及总体上的惩罚。任务错配作为追求科学及其他需要大量前期投资于任务特定人力资本的冒险职业的成本，在实证劳动文献中很少受到关注。
30919.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：I26, J24, J31, J44

30918.title: Financial Crisis in a Socialist Setting: Impact on Political Behavior, Social Trust, and Economic Values
30918.zh_title: 社会主义背景下的金融危机：对政治行为、社会信任和经济价值观的影响
30918.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Netanel Ben-Porath, Victor Lavy, Michal Palgi
30918.abstract: Research on the political and social impacts of financial crises has focused chiefly on free market economies, hindering our understanding of their effects in other settings. We exploit an episode of a financial crisis that hit the Israeli kibbutzim to study its impact in a socialist context. Contrary to findings in capitalistic economies, the crisis led to increased support of liberalized labor markets and reduced support for leftist political parties. These effects persisted in the long run, especially among the young. The crisis also reduced trust in leadership, but trust was restored shortly after agreements to settle the debt were signed, relieving the severity of the crisis. Our findings suggest that economic shocks may have different effects in a free market and socialist systems, in both cases leading individuals to question their current system.
30918.zh_abstract: 关于金融危机政治和社会影响的研究主要集中于自由市场经济，这阻碍了我们对其他背景下其影响的理解。我们利用一场袭击以色列基布兹的金融危机事件，研究其在社会主义背景下的影响。与资本主义经济中的发现相反，这场危机导致对自由化劳动力市场的支持增加，并减少了对左翼政党的支持。这些影响在长期内持续存在，尤其是在年轻人中。危机还降低了对领导层的信任，但在签署债务清偿协议以缓解危机严重性后不久，信任得以恢复。我们的发现表明，经济冲击在自由市场和社会主义体系中可能产生不同影响，在两种情况下都会导致个体质疑他们当前的体系。
30918.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, POL；JEL：J0, P00

30917.title: Reversals and the Returns to Liquidity Provision
30917.zh_title: 反转与流动性供给的回报
30917.authors: Wei Dai, Mamdouh Medhat, Robert Novy-Marx, Savina Rizova
30917.abstract: Different aspects of liquidity impact the performance of short-run reversals in different ways, consistent with the predictions of microstructure models. Higher volatility is associated with faster, initially stronger reversals, while lower turnover is associated with more persistent, ultimately stronger reversals. These facts also hold outside the US and explain several seemingly disparate results in the literature.
30917.zh_abstract: 流动性的不同方面以不同方式影响短期反转的表现，这与微观结构模型的预测一致。较高的波动性与更快、初始更强的反转相关，而较低的换手率与更持久、最终更强的反转相关。这些事实在美国以外也成立，并解释了文献中几个看似不同的结果。

30916.title: Missing Discussions: Institutional Constraints in the Islamic Political Tradition
30916.zh_title: 缺失的讨论：伊斯兰政治传统中的制度约束
30916.authors: A. Arda Gitmez, James A. Robinson, Mehdi Shadmehr
30916.abstract: Institutional constraints to prevent abuses of power have been considered essential in the West. An intellectual tradition emerged to justify them. We identify a puzzle: such an intellectual tradition did not exist in the Islamic world, despite the recognition of potential for abuse. We develop a model to explain this difference in normative traditions. Islamic law was more encompassing than divine law in the West, making it easier for citizens to identify and address abuses of power through collective action. Islamic tradition’s core assumptions made the collective action approach to accountability preferable to the institutional approach favored in the West.
30916.zh_abstract: 防止权力滥用的制度约束在西方被认为至关重要，并产生了一种为其辩护的知识传统。我们识别出一个谜题：在伊斯兰世界，尽管认识到滥用的可能性，但这样的知识传统并不存在。我们开发了一个模型来解释这种规范传统的差异。伊斯兰法比西方的神法更具包容性，这使得公民更容易通过集体行动识别和应对权力滥用。伊斯兰传统的核心假设使得集体行动的问责方法比西方偏好的制度方法更受青睐。

30915.title: Growth and Risk: A View from International Trade
30915.zh_title: 增长与风险：来自国际贸易的视角
30915.authors: Pravin Krishna, Andrei A. Levchenko, Lin Ma, William F. Maloney
30915.abstract: This paper studies the cross-country patterns of risky innovation and growth through the lens of international trade. We use a simple theoretical framework of risky quality upgrading by firms under varying levels of financial development to derive two predictions. First, the mean rate of quality growth and the corresponding cross-sectional variance of quality growth in a country are positively correlated. Second, both the mean and variance of quality changes are positively correlated with the country's level of financial development. We then test these two hypotheses using data on disaggregated (HS10) bilateral exports to the United States. The patterns in the data are consistent with the theory. The mean and the variance of quality growth are strongly positively correlated with each other. Countries with greater financial depth are systematically characterized by higher mean and higher variance in the growth of product quality. Our findings suggest a mean-variance trade-off in product quality improvements along the development path. Increases in financial depth do not imply lower variability of changes in the product space.
30915.zh_abstract: 本文通过国际贸易的视角研究各国风险创新与增长的跨国模式。我们使用一个简单的理论框架，描述企业在不同金融发展水平下进行风险质量升级的行为，从而得出两个预测。首先，一个国家质量增长的平均率与相应的质量增长横截面方差呈正相关。其次，质量变化的均值和方差都与该国的金融发展水平呈正相关。然后，我们利用美国分产品（HS10）双边出口数据检验这两个假设。数据中的模式与理论一致。质量增长的均值和方差彼此强烈正相关。金融深度更大的国家在产品质量增长方面系统性地表现出更高的均值和更高的方差。我们的发现表明，在发展路径上，产品质量改进存在均值-方差权衡。金融深度的增加并不意味着产品空间变化波动性的降低。

30914.title: Florida (Un)Chained
30914.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
30914.abstract: Excessively easy bank credit – visible in unusually small credit risk spreads and rapid loan growth – is often posited as a root cause of unsustainable asset price booms. This paper considers whether an increase in bank risk tolerance drove high loan growth that coincided with Florida’s land boom of the mid-1920s, the first Florida housing boom in which buyers from around the nation participated. Estimates suggest that an astounding 20 million lots were offered for sale in Florida at that time. Our detailed narrative and empirical evidence suggest that the facts do not require the assumption of increased risk appetite during the boom. We find that most Florida banks that failed were associated with the Manley-Anthony chain and did not exhibit increases in observable indicators of risk during the boom. Instead, their increases in risk mainly reflected hidden choices either to lend to bank insiders on a preferential basis or to fund other banks that were engaged in such risky and often fraudulent activities. Bank regulators seem to have been complicit in the hidden risk-taking. Even informed investors would have been left in the dark about the amount of risk that was growing in Florida.
30914.zh_abstract: 过度宽松的银行信贷——表现为异常小的信用风险利差和快速的贷款增长——常被认为是不可持续资产价格繁荣的根本原因。本文探讨银行风险容忍度的提高是否推动了高贷款增长，而这一增长恰逢1920年代中期佛罗里达的土地繁荣，这是第一次有全国买家参与的佛罗里达住房繁荣。估计显示，当时佛罗里达有惊人的2000万块地块被挂牌出售。我们详细的叙述和实证证据表明，事实并不需要假设繁荣期间风险偏好增加。我们发现，大多数倒闭的佛罗里达银行都与曼利-安东尼连锁银行有关，并且在繁荣期间并未表现出可观察风险指标的上升。相反，它们的风险增加主要反映了隐藏的选择，即要么以优惠条件向银行内部人士放贷，要么为从事此类高风险且往往欺诈活动的其他银行提供资金。银行监管机构似乎对这些隐藏的风险承担行为默许。即使是有信息的投资者也无法了解佛罗里达州不断增长的风险规模。

30913.title: Blockchain for Timely Transfer of Intellectual Property
30913.zh_title: 用于知识产权及时转让的区块链
30913.authors: Dongling Cai, Yi Qian, Ning Nan
30913.abstract: This article examines how blockchain technology can facilitate innovation by streamlining the licensing process of intellectual property (IP). In the traditional world, there can be tension between inventors and developers when it comes to licensing IP before a patent is granted. Developers need more information about the IP in order to estimate its value, while inventors are hesitant to disclose too much information for fear that developers will use it to develop and commercialize the IP without licensing it. The blockchain's ability to create a transparent and secure record of the inventing process can alleviate these concerns. On the one hand, blockchain's traceability helps protect IP from infringement, encouraging inventors to disclose more information about their high-value IP. On the other hand, developers have more incentive to license IP rather than infringe on it because of the risk of punishment. The size of the community maintaining the blockchain is a crucial factor in ensuring the validity of the blockchain. A community that is too large or too small would not be able to reach equilibrium. These findings provide insights into how blockchain can be used to improve the economics and marketing of IP.
30913.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了区块链技术如何通过简化知识产权（IP）的许可流程来促进创新。在传统世界中，在专利授予之前许可知识产权时，发明人和开发者之间可能存在紧张关系。开发者需要更多关于知识产权的信息来评估其价值，而发明人则不愿披露过多信息，担心开发者会利用这些信息在未获得许可的情况下开发和商业化该知识产权。区块链创建透明且安全的发明过程记录的能力可以缓解这些担忧。一方面，区块链的可追溯性有助于保护知识产权免受侵权，鼓励发明人披露更多关于其高价值知识产权的信息。另一方面，由于存在惩罚风险，开发者更有动力许可知识产权而非侵权。维护区块链的社区规模是确保区块链有效性的关键因素。社区过大或过小都无法达到均衡。这些发现为如何利用区块链改善知识产权的经济学和营销提供了见解。

30912.title: Scaling Smart Contracts via Layer-2 Technologies: Some Empirical Evidence
30912.zh_title: 通过二层技术扩展智能合约：一些实证证据
30912.authors: Lin William Cong, Xiang Hui, Catherine Tucker, Luofeng Zhou
30912.abstract: Blockchain-based smart contracts can potentially replace certain traditional contracts through decentralized enforcement and reduced transaction costs. However, scalability is a key bottleneck hindering their broader application and adoption, often leading to concentrated or exclusive networks. To avoid falling short of the original promise of the technology, firms actively explore "layer-2" methods for scaling. We provide some initial evidence on the economic implications of a layer-2 scaling solution, which moves information aggregation from on-chain to off-chain peer-to-peer networks. A parallel-system experiment allows clean identification because we observe the same unit in the treatment and control systems at the same time. We find that this scaling solution reduces operating costs by 76%, and importantly, leads to decentralization with lower market concentration and more participation, which in turn improves data accuracy. The findings provide initial evidence of how blockchain and smart contracting technologies evolve towards achieving decentralized and scalable trust.
30912.zh_abstract: 基于区块链的智能合约有可能通过去中心化执行和降低交易成本来取代某些传统合约。然而，可扩展性是阻碍其更广泛应用和采纳的关键瓶颈，常常导致网络集中或排他。为了避免偏离该技术的原始承诺，企业积极探索用于扩展的“二层”方法。我们提供了一些关于二层扩展方案经济影响的初步证据，该方案将信息聚合从链上转移到链下的点对点网络。一个平行系统实验允许清晰的识别，因为我们同时观察了处理系统和对照系统中的同一单位。我们发现，这种扩展方案将运营成本降低了76%，并且重要的是，它导致了去中心化，表现为更低的市场集中度和更高的参与度，这反过来又提高了数据准确性。这些发现提供了关于区块链和智能合约技术如何朝着实现去中心化和可扩展信任演进的初步证据。

30911.title: The Internet, Search Frictions and Aggregate Unemployment
30911.zh_title: 互联网、搜索摩擦与总体失业
30911.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Domenico Ferraro, Andreas R. Kostøl, Trond C. Vigtel
30911.abstract: How has the internet affected search and hiring, and what are the implications for aggregate unemployment? Answering these questions empirically has proven difficult due to selection in internet use and difficulty in measuring the search activities of both sides of the labor market. This paper overcomes these challenges by combining plausibly exogenous variation in the availability of high-speed internet in Norway with large-scale survey and administrative data on hiring firms, job seekers, and vacancies. Our empirical analysis shows that the internet expansion led more firms to recruit online and caused 9% shorter vacancy durations and 13% fewer unsuccessful hiring attempts. While the expansion increased job-finding rates by 2.4% and starting wages by 6% among the unemployed, we find no evidence of changes in job-to-job mobility or wage growth for employees. To interpret these findings, we develop and calibrate an equilibrium search model with endogenous job creation and destruction where workers decide how much search effort to exert on and off the job. Through the lens of the calibrated model, we find that better search technology is the main driving force behind our quasi-experimental evidence. Our calculations indicate that the steady-state unemployment rate fell by as much as 14% due to the broadband internet expansion.
30911.zh_abstract: 互联网如何影响了搜索和招聘，以及对总体失业有何影响？由于互联网使用中的选择性问题以及难以衡量劳动力市场双方的搜索活动，对这些问题的实证研究一直很困难。本文通过将挪威高速互联网可用性的看似外生变化与关于招聘企业、求职者和职位空缺的大规模调查和行政数据相结合，克服了这些挑战。我们的实证分析表明，互联网扩张导致更多企业进行在线招聘，并使职位空缺持续时间缩短了9%，招聘失败尝试减少了13%。虽然扩张使失业者的工作找到率提高了2.4%，起薪提高了6%，但我们没有发现证据表明员工的工作转换或工资增长发生了变化。为了解释这些发现，我们开发并校准了一个具有内生工作创造和破坏的均衡搜索模型，在该模型中，工人决定在在职和离职状态下投入多少搜索努力。通过校准模型的视角，我们发现更好的搜索技术是我们准实验证据背后的主要驱动力。我们的计算表明，由于宽带互联网的扩张，稳态失业率下降了多达14%。

30910.title: Dynamic Inconsistency in Risky Choice: Evidence from the Lab and Field
30910.zh_title: 风险选择中的动态不一致性：来自实验室和实地证据
30910.authors: Rawley Z. Heimer, Zwetelina Iliewa, Alex Imas, Martin Weber
30910.abstract: We document a robust dynamic inconsistency in risky choice. Using a unique brokerage dataset and a series of experiments, we compare people's initial risk-taking plans to their subsequent decisions. Across settings, people accept risk as part of a “loss-exit” strategy—planning to continue taking risk after gains and stopping after losses. Actual behavior deviates from initial strategies by cutting gains early and chasing losses. More people accept risk when offered a commitment to their initial strategy. Our results help reconcile seemingly contradictory findings on risk-taking in static versus dynamic contexts. We explore implications for theory and welfare.
30910.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一种稳健的风险选择动态不一致性。利用一个独特的经纪数据集和一系列实验，我们比较了人们最初的风险承担计划与其后续决策。在不同情境下，人们将风险承担作为“损失退出”策略的一部分——计划在盈利后继续承担风险，在亏损后停止。实际行为偏离了初始策略，表现为过早了结盈利并追逐亏损。当被提供承诺执行初始策略时，更多人接受风险。我们的结果有助于调和关于静态与动态情境下风险承担看似矛盾的发现。我们探讨了对理论和福利的启示。

30909.title: Societal Disruptions And Child Mental Health: Evidence From ADHD Diagnosis During The COVID-19 Pandemic
30909.zh_title: 社会动荡与儿童心理健康：来自COVID-19疫情期间ADHD诊断的证据
30909.authors: Seth M. Freedman, Kelli R. Marquardt, Dario Salcedo, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
30909.abstract: We study how the societal disruptions of the COVID-19 pandemic impacted diagnosis of a prevalent childhood mental health condition, Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). Using both nationwide private health insurance claims and a single state’s comprehensive electronic health records, we compare children exposed to the pandemic to same aged children prior to the pandemic. We find the pandemic reduced new ADHD diagnoses by 8.6% among boys and 11.0% among girls nationwide through February 2021. We further show that higher levels of in-person schooling in Fall 2020 dampened the decline for girls but had no moderating effect for boys.
30909.zh_abstract: 我们研究了COVID-19大流行的社会动荡如何影响一种普遍的儿童心理健康状况——注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）的诊断。利用全国性的私人健康保险索赔数据和一个州的综合电子健康记录，我们将暴露于大流行期间的儿童与大流行前同龄儿童进行比较。我们发现，截至2021年2月，大流行使全国范围内男孩的新ADHD诊断减少了8.6%，女孩减少了11.0%。我们进一步表明，2020年秋季更高水平的线下教学减弱了女孩诊断下降的趋势，但对男孩没有调节作用。

30908.title: Child Labor Standards in Regional Trade Agreements: Theory and Evidence
30908.zh_title: 区域贸易协定中的童工标准：理论与证据
30908.authors: Ryan M. Abman, Clark C. Lundberg, John McLaren, Michele Ruta
30908.abstract: We study the impact of child labor standards in Regional Trade Agreements (RTAs) on a variety of child labor market outcomes, including employment, education, and household inequality. We develop a stylized general equilibrium model of child labor in an economy open to international trade and consider the impact of RTAs with and without child labor bans. We empirically investigate the effects of these clauses in trade agreements in a broad international panel of 101 developing countries using harmonized survey microdata. Exploiting quasi-experimental methods to obtain plausibly causal estimates, we find that RTAs without child-labor bans lead to reductions in child employment and increases in school enrollment, particularly for older children aged 14--17. Child labor bans in RTAs perversely increase child employment among 14--17 year olds and decrease school enrollment for both young and older children. These effects appear to decrease inter-household income inequality through increased child earnings. Our findings are consistent with theoretical predictions from our model and the literature on child labor bans.
30908.zh_abstract: 我们研究了区域贸易协定（RTA）中的童工标准对一系列童工市场结果的影响，包括就业、教育和家庭不平等。我们构建了一个对国际贸易开放的经济体中童工的简约一般均衡模型，并考虑了有和没有童工禁令的RTA的影响。我们利用协调的调查微观数据，在包含101个发展中国家的广泛国际面板数据中，实证研究了这些贸易协定条款的影响。通过使用准实验方法获得看似因果的估计，我们发现没有童工禁令的RTA导致儿童就业减少和入学率增加，特别是对于14-17岁的较大儿童。RTA中的童工禁令反而增加了14-17岁儿童的就业，并降低了年幼和较大儿童的入学率。这些效应似乎通过增加儿童收入来降低家庭间收入不平等。我们的发现与我们的模型以及关于童工禁令文献的理论预测一致。

30907.title: Bank Funding Risk, Reference Rates, and Credit Supply
30907.zh_title: 银行融资风险、参考利率与信贷供给
30907.authors: Harry R. Cooperman, Darrell Duffie, Stephan Luck, Zachry Z. Wang, Yilin Yang
30907.abstract: Corporate credit lines are drawn more heavily when funding markets are more stressed. This covariance elevates expected bank funding costs. We show that credit supply is dampened by the associated debt-overhang cost to bank shareholders. Until 2022, this impact was reduced by linking the interest paid on lines to credit-sensitive reference rates such as LIBOR. We show that transition to risk-free reference rates may exacerbate this friction. The adverse impact on credit supply is offset if drawdowns are expected to be left on deposit at the same bank, which happened at some of the largest banks during the COVID recession.
30907.zh_abstract: 企业信贷额度在融资市场压力更大时被更多地提取。这种协方差提高了银行的预期融资成本。我们表明，信贷供给因相关的银行股东债务积压成本而受到抑制。直到2022年，通过将额度支付的利息与信用敏感型参考利率（如LIBOR）挂钩，这种影响得以减轻。我们表明，向无风险参考利率的过渡可能会加剧这种摩擦。如果预期提取的资金会存放在同一家银行（这在COVID-19衰退期间一些最大的银行中发生过），那么对信贷供给的不利影响将被抵消。
30907.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：E4, E43, G00, G01, G02, G20, G21

30958.title: Loose Monetary Policy and Financial Instability
30958.zh_title: 宽松货币政策与金融不稳定
30958.authors: Maximilian Grimm, Òscar Jordà, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
30958.abstract: Do periods of persistently loose monetary policy increase financial fragility and the likelihood of a financial crisis? This is a central question for policymakers, yet the literature does not provide systematic empirical evidence about this link at the aggregate level. In this paper we fill this gap by analyzing long-run historical data. We find that when the stance of monetary policy is accommodative over an extended period, the likelihood of financial turmoil down the road increases considerably. We investigate the causal pathways that lead to this result and argue that credit creation and asset price overheating are important intermediating channels.
30958.zh_abstract: 持续宽松的货币政策时期是否会增加金融脆弱性和金融危机的可能性？这是政策制定者面临的一个核心问题，然而文献并未在总体层面提供关于这种联系的系统性经验证据。在本文中，我们通过分析长期历史数据来填补这一空白。我们发现，当货币政策立场在较长时期内保持宽松时，未来发生金融动荡的可能性会显著增加。我们研究了导致这一结果的因果路径，并认为信贷创造和资产价格过热是重要的中介渠道。
30958.meta: Programs：AP, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E58, G01, G21, N10

30957.title: Language Models and Cognitive Automation for Economic Research
30957.zh_title: 语言模型与经济学研究的认知自动化
30957.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT have the potential to revolutionize research in economics and other disciplines. I describe 25 use cases along six domains in which LLMs are starting to become useful as both research assistants and tutors: ideation, writing, background research, data analysis, coding, and mathematical derivations. I provide general instructions and demonstrate specific examples for how to take advantage of each of these, classifying the LLM capabilities from experimental to highly useful. I hypothesize that ongoing advances will improve the performance of LLMs across all of these domains, and that economic researchers who take advantage of LLMs to automate micro tasks will become significantly more productive. Finally, I speculate on the longer-term implications of cognitive automation via LLMs for economic research.
30957.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）有潜力彻底改变经济学及其他学科的研究。我描述了六个领域的25个用例，在这些领域中，大型语言模型作为研究助手和导师开始变得有用：构思、写作、背景研究、数据分析、编码和数学推导。我提供了通用指令，并展示了如何利用每个用例的具体示例，将大型语言模型的能力从实验性分类到高度有用。我假设持续的进步将提高大型语言模型在所有领域的表现，并且利用大型语言模型自动化微观任务的经济学研究者将变得显著更高效。最后，我推测了通过大型语言模型实现认知自动化对经济学研究的长期影响。
30957.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：A10, B41, J23, O3

30956.title: The Economic Opportunity Cost of Green Recovery Plans
30956.zh_title: 绿色复苏计划的经济机会成本
30956.abstract: Advocates in several countries have promoted a “green recovery” from the pandemic, with an emphasis on measures to address climate objectives. We evaluate proposals for the United States and find that as stated, ambitious plans to further cut emissions from transportation and electricity will require more inputs to produce the same outputs, resulting in recurring costs of up to $\$483$ billion per year. We forecast that real GDP and consumption will be 2-3 percent less in the long run if policies are implemented as stated, underscoring the opportunity costs of achieving green objectives when resources might be more efficiently deployed.
30956.zh_abstract: 多个国家的倡导者推动从疫情中进行“绿色复苏”，重点在于应对气候目标的措施。我们评估了美国的提案，发现按照所述，进一步削减交通和电力排放的雄心勃勃计划将需要更多投入来生产相同产出，导致每年高达4830亿美元的经常性成本。我们预测，如果政策按所述实施，长期内实际GDP和消费将减少2-3%，这突显了当资源可能被更有效配置时实现绿色目标的机会成本。

30955.title: Estimating Causal Effects of Fertility on Life Course Outcomes: Evidence Using A Dyadic Genetic Instrumental Variable Approach
30955.zh_title: 估计生育对生命历程结果的因果效应：基于二元遗传工具变量方法的证据
30955.authors: Boyan Zheng, Qiongshi Lu, Jason Fletcher
30955.abstract: The causal effects of fertility are a central focus in the social sciences, but the analysis is challenged by the endogeneity of fertility choices. Earlier work has proposed several “natural experiments” from twin births or gender composition of earlier births to assess whether having more children affects adults’ outcomes, though there are limitations to using rare (twins) and weak (gender composition) instrumental variables for fertility. This paper proposes a new “natural experiment” approach to assessing the causal effects of fertility by measuring the combination of couples’ genetics in predicting fertility—a dyadic genetic instrumental variable, where the key idea (exclusion restriction) is that the interactions of the couple’s genetics that shift the likelihood of fertility is unknown to the couples. We use a nationally representative sample of couples to examine the long-lasting effects of fertility on older adults’ life outcomes, including labor market outcomes, personality traits, and subjective wellbeing. We find that fertility reduces females’ extraversion and years of working and some evidence indicates that fertility reduces both males’ and females’ lifetime number of jobs worked.
30955.zh_abstract: 生育的因果效应是社会科学的焦点，但分析因生育选择的内生性而面临挑战。早期研究提出了几种来自双胞胎出生或先前出生性别构成的“自然实验”，以评估生育更多孩子是否影响成人结果，尽管使用罕见（双胞胎）和弱（性别构成）的工具变量来研究生育存在局限性。本文提出了一种新的“自然实验”方法，通过测量夫妻基因组合来预测生育——一种二元遗传工具变量，其关键思想（排除限制）是，夫妻基因相互作用改变生育可能性的情况对夫妻而言是未知的。我们使用一个全国代表性的夫妻样本来考察生育对老年人生活结果的长期影响，包括劳动力市场结果、人格特质和主观幸福感。我们发现，生育降低了女性的外向性和工作年限，一些证据表明生育减少了男性和女性一生中从事的工作数量。
30955.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：J10, J13, J22, J29

30954.title: Production Network Formation, Trade, and Welfare
30954.zh_title: 生产网络形成、贸易与福利
30954.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Federico Huneeus, Yuhei Miyauchi
30954.abstract: We study the aggregate implications of endogenous production network formation in a multi-location general equilibrium trade model. Firms form supplier and buyer linkages under matching frictions, generating a gravity structure of production networks. We analytically characterize the welfare gains from trade cost reductions relative to a benchmark model with fixed production networks. We calibrate the model to Chilean firm-to-firm data and show that it matches observed domestic and international network responses to tariff reductions. We find that endogenous networks substantially increase the welfare gains from trade, due to inefficiently low equilibrium networks and amplification effects through relationship-formation costs.
30954.zh_abstract: 我们研究了多区位一般均衡贸易模型中内生生产网络形成的总体影响。企业在匹配摩擦下形成供应商和买家联系，产生生产网络的引力结构。我们相对于一个固定生产网络的基准模型，分析性地刻画了贸易成本降低带来的福利收益。我们将模型校准到智利企业间数据，并表明它匹配了观察到的国内和国际网络对关税削减的反应。我们发现，由于均衡网络效率低下以及通过关系形成成本的放大效应，内生网络显著增加了贸易带来的福利收益。

30953.title: Measuring Domestic Factor Content in Bilateral and Sectoral-Level Trade Flows
30953.zh_title: 衡量双边和部门层面贸易流中的国内要素含量
30953.authors: Zhi Wang, Shang-Jin Wei, Kunfu Zhu
30953.abstract: Measuring country origins of factor content in bilateral or sector-level exports is important to understand evolution of regional and global value chains and the roles of individual country-sectors in these chains. This paper proposes a method to distinguish between measures based on backward and forward linkages and between net and gross factor content. It is consistent with the System of National Account Standard and has the adding-up property. In comparison, these properties do not hold for the “hypothetical extraction method” proposed by Los et al. (2016). We show a number of examples involving disaggregated trade in which the two methods diverge.
30953.zh_abstract: 衡量双边或部门层面出口中要素含量的国家来源，对于理解区域和全球价值链的演变以及单个国家-部门在这些链条中的作用至关重要。本文提出了一种方法，以区分基于后向联系和前向联系的衡量指标，以及净要素含量和总要素含量。该方法与国民账户体系标准一致，并具有可加性。相比之下，这些性质对于Los等人（2016）提出的“假设提取法”并不成立。我们展示了涉及细分贸易的几个例子，其中两种方法存在差异。

30952.title: Dynamic Pricing Regulation and Welfare in Insurance Markets
30952.zh_title: 保险市场中的动态定价监管与福利
30952.abstract: While the traditional role of insurers is to provide protection against individuals’ idiosyncratic risks, insurers themselves face substantial uncertainties due to aggregate shocks. To prevent insurers from passing these aggregate risks onto consumers, governments have increasingly adopted dynamic pricing regulations, which limit insurers’ ability to change premiums over time. We evaluate dynamic pricing regulation using an equilibrium model of the U.S. long-term care insurance market, featuring insurers’ lack of commitment and endogenous market structures. We find that stricter dynamic pricing regulation has a limited impact on improving consumer welfare, while it reduces insurer profits and increases market concentration.
30952.zh_abstract: 虽然保险公司的传统角色是为个人特有的风险提供保障，但保险公司自身也面临着由总体冲击带来的巨大不确定性。为了防止保险公司将这些总体风险转嫁给消费者，政府越来越多地采用动态定价监管，限制保险公司随时间调整保费的能力。我们利用一个美国长期护理保险市场的均衡模型来评估动态定价监管，该模型考虑了保险公司缺乏承诺以及内生市场结构的特点。我们发现，更严格的动态定价监管对改善消费者福利的影响有限，同时会降低保险公司利润并增加市场集中度。
30952.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D14, G22, I13, L11, L51

30951.title: Direct and Spillover Effects of Provider Vaccination Facilitation
30951.zh_title: 医疗服务提供者促进疫苗接种的直接效应与溢出效应
30951.authors: Julie Berry Cullen, Maria K. Humlum, Agne Suziedelyte, Peter Rønø Thingholm
30951.abstract: We explore physicians’ role in moderating compliance with recommended vaccinations. Using administrative data on the universe of Danish children and their healthcare providers, we first construct and validate a measure of providers’ propensities to facilitate recommended vaccinations from birth to age 6 based on a two-way fixed effects model. We then show that the measure meaningfully affects uptake of the human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccine among adolescent patients and speeds recovery from a media-induced crisis to perceived HPV vaccine safety. Providers affect decisions beyond those of their own patients, influencing the uptake of patients’ younger cousins by one-fifth as much as own patients’ uptake.
30951.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了医生在调节推荐疫苗接种依从性方面的作用。利用涵盖所有丹麦儿童及其医疗保健提供者的行政数据，我们首先基于一个双向固定效应模型，构建并验证了一个衡量医疗服务提供者从出生到6岁期间促进推荐疫苗接种倾向的指标。然后，我们表明该指标显著影响了青少年患者对人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）疫苗的接种率，并加速了因媒体引发的对HPV疫苗安全性信任危机后的恢复。医疗服务提供者的影响超出了其自身患者的范围，他们对患者表亲接种率的影响程度相当于对自身患者接种率影响程度的五分之一。

30950.title: The Effect of R&D on Quality, Productivity, and Welfare
30950.zh_title: 研发对质量、生产率和福利的影响
30950.authors: Mons Chan, Amil Petrin, Frederic Warzynski
30950.abstract: In this paper we provide a methodology that jointly studies production and demand for multi-product firms using detailed firm-product level data from Denmark. We estimate marginal cost by combining production function estimation with a cost function that allows for quasi-fixed inputs. We use a discrete choice demand model that extends insights from Berry, Levinsohn and Pakes (1995) to obtain a measure of the demand shock (quality). We estimate the relationship between product (process) R&D and quality (efficiency), and find strong evidence that process innovation is related to higher efficiency, while product innovation is associated with higher product quality. We discuss the welfare implications of these two distinct innovation activities.
30950.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了一种方法论，利用来自丹麦的详细企业-产品层面数据，联合研究多产品企业的生产与需求。我们通过将生产函数估计与允许准固定投入的成本函数相结合来估计边际成本。我们使用一个离散选择需求模型，该模型扩展了Berry、Levinsohn和Pakes（1995）的见解，以获得需求冲击（质量）的度量。我们估计了产品（过程）研发与质量（效率）之间的关系，并发现强有力的证据表明过程创新与更高的效率相关，而产品创新则与更高的产品质量相关。我们讨论了这两种不同创新活动的福利含义。

30949.title: Inclusion and Democratization Through Web3 and DeFi? Initial Evidence from the Ethereum Ecosystem
30949.zh_title: 通过Web3和DeFi实现包容性与民主化？来自以太坊生态系统的初步证据
30949.authors: Lin William Cong, Ke Tang, Yanxin Wang, Xi Zhao
30949.abstract: Web3 and DeFi are widely advocated as innovations for greater financial inclusion and democratization. We assemble the most comprehensive dataset to date on the largest Web3 ecosystem and use large-scale computing to conduct an initial investigation. We describe Ethereum’s network structure, time trends, and distributions of transactions, mining, and ownership. Mining income and Ether ownership are concentrated in exchanges and a few individual nodes. Network activities evolve from peer-to-peer to user-DApps/DeFi interactions, with significantly more transactions by large players. Moreover, high percentage transaction fees, congestion-induced fluctuation of gas prices, suboptimal reserve setting, and large return volatility of tokens present particular challenges for small, poor, unsophisticated, and new nodes, not to mention that the high failure rates hurt all users. Finally, we present suggestive causal evidence that base-fee burning mechanisms (e.g., EIP-1559) and airdrop programs (e.g., OmiseGo Airdrop) facilitate inclusion through token monetary redistribution.
30949.zh_abstract: Web3和DeFi被广泛倡导为促进金融包容性和民主化的创新。我们汇集了迄今为止关于最大Web3生态系统的最全面数据集，并使用大规模计算进行了初步调查。我们描述了以太坊的网络结构、时间趋势以及交易、挖矿和所有权的分布。挖矿收入和以太币所有权集中在交易所和少数个体节点。网络活动从点对点演变为用户与DApps/DeFi的交互，大型参与者的交易显著增多。此外，高比例的交易费用、拥堵导致的Gas价格波动、次优的储备设置以及代币收益的大幅波动，对小型、贫困、缺乏经验和新的节点构成了特殊挑战，更不用说高失败率对所有用户造成的损害。最后，我们提出了提示性因果证据，表明基础费用燃烧机制（例如EIP-1559）和空投计划（例如OmiseGo空投）通过代币货币再分配促进了包容性。
30949.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME, PR；JEL：D63, E50, G29, H23, L14

30948.title: Donor Contracting Conditions and Public Procurement: Causal Evidence from Kenyan Electrification
30948.zh_title: 捐助者合同条件与公共采购：来自肯尼亚电气化的因果证据
30948.authors: Catherine Wolfram, Edward Miguel, Eric Hsu, Susanna B. Berkouwer
30948.abstract: There is limited causal evidence on the effects of different public procurement regulations on project quality and value-for-money for projects funded by national governments and foreign aid donors. This paper uses policy and experimental variation to study how two key contracting features—namely, contract bundling and monitoring—affect outcomes of a large economic development project. We leverage an unusual feature of Kenya’s nationwide electrification program: the quasi-random allocation of multilateral funding sources across nearby villages. African Development Bank (AfDB) projects used bundled contracts while the World Bank (WB) employed unbundled contracts together with strengthened inspections. To measure impacts, we collect on-the-ground engineering assessments, power quality data, household surveys, and analyze original contracts. The analysis suggests a stark trade-off: WB procedures delayed construction completion by 16 months relative to AfDB sites but improved construction quality by a sizeable 0.6 standard deviations. To disentangle the effects of contract bundling versus monitoring, we conducted randomized audits that enhanced monitoring. The audits improve household connectivity, network size, and voltage at AfDB sites, but have no impact at WB sites, suggesting monitoring and unbundling contracts may be substitutes. Given the apparent trade-off, we investigate how net benefits depend on policymaker time preferences and infrastructure longevity.
30948.zh_abstract: 关于不同的公共采购法规对由国家政府和外国援助捐助者资助的项目质量和性价比的影响，目前因果证据有限。本文利用政策变化和实验变异，研究两个关键的合同特征——即合同捆绑和监控——如何影响一个大型经济发展项目的结果。我们利用了肯尼亚全国电气化计划的一个不寻常特点：多边资金来源在邻近村庄之间的准随机分配。非洲开发银行（AfDB）的项目使用捆绑合同，而世界银行（WB）则采用非捆绑合同并加强检查。为了衡量影响，我们收集了实地工程评估、电能质量数据、家庭调查，并分析了原始合同。分析表明存在明显的权衡：与AfDB项目点相比，世界银行的程序使建设完工延迟了16个月，但将建设质量提高了0.6个标准差，幅度相当大。为了区分合同捆绑与监控的影响，我们进行了随机审计以加强监控。审计提高了AfDB项目点的家庭连接率、网络规模和电压，但对世界银行项目点没有影响，这表明监控与非捆绑合同可能是替代品。鉴于这种明显的权衡，我们研究了净收益如何取决于政策制定者的时间偏好和基础设施的寿命。
30948.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D73, F35, H5, L94, O19

30947.title: Ideas Mobilize People: The Diffusion of Communist Ideology in China
30947.zh_title: 思想动员人民：共产主义意识形态在中国的传播
30947.authors: Ying Bai, Ruixue Jia, Runnan Wang
30947.abstract: Can ideas mobilize people into collective action? We provide a positive answer to this question by studying how exposure to the Communist ideology shaped an individual’s choice to join the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) during the party’s formative stage. The individuals we focus on are cadets at the Whampoa Military Academy, who subsequently fought in 20th-century China’s most important wars. Our identification strategy exploits the locality-time-content variation in the circulation of the New Youth magazine—the major platform to promote Communism after the Treaty of Versailles in 1919—as well as the variation in an individual’s location over time. By comparing the Whampoa cadets living in a locality with post-1919 New Youth available against those who had lived in the same locality but missed this channel, we demonstrate that the former were significantly more likely to join the CCP. In future political struggles, those whose party choice was more influenced by this ideology channel were less likely to quit the CCP and more likely to sacrifice their lives. Additionally, we document that family background cannot predict the party choice of these political pioneers but social networks can complement ideology exposure.
30947.zh_abstract: 思想能否动员人们参与集体行动？我们通过研究接触共产主义意识形态如何影响个人在党的形成阶段选择加入中国共产党（CCP），为这个问题提供了肯定答案。我们关注的个体是黄埔军校的学员，他们随后参加了20世纪中国最重要的战争。我们的识别策略利用了《新青年》杂志（1919年凡尔赛条约后推广共产主义的主要平台）发行量在地区、时间和内容上的变化，以及个体随时间所处地点的变化。通过比较生活在有1919年后《新青年》可获取地区的黄埔学员与曾生活在同一地区但错过了这一渠道的学员，我们证明前者加入中国共产党的可能性显著更高。在未来的政治斗争中，那些政党选择受此意识形态渠道影响更大的个体，更不可能退出中国共产党，并且更有可能牺牲生命。此外，我们记录到家庭背景无法预测这些政治先驱的政党选择，但社会网络可以补充意识形态接触的影响。
30947.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：D70, D71, D83, N45, O12, P30

30946.title: Unsupervised Machine Learning for Explainable Health Care Fraud Detection
30946.zh_title: 用于可解释医疗欺诈检测的无监督机器学习
30946.authors: Shubhranshu Shekhar, Jetson Leder-Luis, Leman Akoglu
30946.abstract: The US spends more than 4 trillion dollars per year on health care, largely conducted by private providers and reimbursed by insurers. A major concern in this system is overbilling, waste and fraud by providers, who face incentives to misreport on their claims in order to receive higher payments. In this work, we develop novel machine learning tools to identify providers that overbill insurers. Using large-scale claims data from Medicare, the US federal health insurance program for elderly adults and the disabled, we identify patterns consistent with fraud or overbilling among inpatient hospitalizations. Our proposed approach for fraud detection is fully unsupervised, not relying on any labeled training data, and is explainable to end users, providing reasoning and interpretable insights into the potentially suspicious behavior of the flagged providers. Data from the Department of Justice on providers facing anti-fraud lawsuits and case studies of suspicious providers validate our approach and findings. We also perform a post-analysis to understand hospital characteristics, those not used for detection but associate with a high suspiciousness score. Our method provides an 8-fold lift over random targeting, and can be used to guide investigations and auditing of suspicious providers for both public and private health insurance systems.
30946.zh_abstract: 美国每年在医疗保健上的支出超过4万亿美元，主要由私人提供者执行并由保险公司报销。该系统的一个主要问题是提供者存在过度收费、浪费和欺诈行为，因为他们有动机在索赔中虚报以获取更高的赔付。在这项工作中，我们开发了新颖的机器学习工具来识别向保险公司过度收费的提供者。利用来自美国联邦医疗保险（Medicare，为老年人和残疾人提供的联邦健康保险计划）的大规模索赔数据，我们识别出住院治疗中与欺诈或过度收费一致的模式。我们提出的欺诈检测方法完全是无监督的，不依赖于任何标记的训练数据，并且对最终用户是可解释的，为被标记提供者的潜在可疑行为提供推理和可解释的见解。来自司法部关于面临反欺诈诉讼的提供者的数据以及对可疑提供者的案例研究验证了我们的方法和发现。我们还进行了事后分析，以了解医院特征——那些未用于检测但与高可疑评分相关的特征。我们的方法相比随机定位提供了8倍的提升，可用于指导公共和私人医疗保险系统对可疑提供者的调查和审计。
30946.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：C19, D73, I13, K42, M42

30945.title: Hobbesian Wars and Separation of Powers
30945.zh_title: 霍布斯式战争与权力分立
30945.authors: Weijia Li, Gérard Roland, Yang Xie
30945.abstract: This paper formalizes the principle that persecution power of government may generate violent contests over it. We show that this principle yields a large set of theoretical insights on different separation-of-powers institutions that can help to preempt such contests under different socio-economic conditions. When socio-economic cohesion is low, the risk of contests can be eliminated only by individual veto against persecution. Moreover, such unanimity rule is resilient to autocratic shocks only when the chief executive does not control the legislative agenda, i.e., the executive and legislative branches are separate. When socio-economic cohesion is high, the risk of violent contests can be eliminated without individual veto, but only by a persecution-reviewing judiciary whose members cannot join the executive branch in the future, i.e., when the executive and judicial branches are separate. Our results shed light on the evolution of separation of powers in European history.
30945.zh_abstract: 本文形式化了这样一个原则：政府的迫害权力可能引发围绕该权力的暴力争夺。我们表明，这一原则产生了大量关于不同权力分立制度的理论见解，这些制度有助于在不同的社会经济条件下预防此类争夺。当社会经济凝聚力较低时，只有通过个人对迫害的否决权才能消除争夺的风险。此外，这种全体一致规则只有在行政首脑不控制立法议程时才能抵御专制冲击，即行政和立法部门是分离的。当社会经济凝聚力较高时，无需个人否决权即可消除暴力争夺的风险，但只能通过一个其成员未来不能加入行政部门的迫害审查司法机构来实现，即行政和司法部门是分离的。我们的研究结果揭示了欧洲历史上权力分立的演变。

30944.title: Catching Up by ‘Deglobalizing’: Capital Account Policy and Economic Growth
30944.zh_title: 通过“去全球化”实现赶超：资本账户政策与经济增长
30944.authors: Paul Bergin, Woo Jin Choi, Ju H. Pyun
30944.abstract: While substantial empirical research has evaluated the question of whether capital account openness promotes economic growth, this paper finds empirical evidence for cases where the opposite is true—that a policy of capital controls can promote economic growth, when combined with a policy of reserve accumulation. Using panel data from 45 countries from 1985–2019, we find that capital controls combined with reserve accumulation—strategic capital account policy—contribute to growth in real GDP and TFP. This effect is stronger for emerging markets and prior to the global financial crisis. We show that the policy is strongly associated with enlarging the scale of the manufacturing sector and productivity, and is consistent with theories of learning-by-doing through exporting.
30944.zh_abstract: 尽管大量实证研究评估了资本账户开放是否促进经济增长，本文发现了相反情况的实证证据——即资本管制政策与储备积累政策相结合时，可以促进经济增长。利用1985年至2019年45个国家的面板数据，我们发现资本管制与储备积累相结合（即战略性资本账户政策）有助于实际GDP和全要素生产率的增长。这种效应在新兴市场以及全球金融危机之前更为显著。我们表明，该政策与制造业规模和生产率的大幅提升密切相关，并且与通过出口实现“干中学”的理论相一致。

30943.title: The Economics of Digital Privacy
30943.abstract: There has been increasing attention to privacy in the media and in regulatory discussions. This is a consequence of the increased usefulness of digital data. The literature has emphasized the benefits and costs of digital data flows to consumers and firms. The benefits arise in the form of data-driven innovation, higher quality products and services that match consumer needs, and increased profits. The costs relate to intrinsic and instrumental values of privacy. Under standard economic assumptions, this framing of a cost-benefit tradeoff might suggest little role for regulation beyond ensuring consumers are appropriately informed in a robust competitive environment. The empirical literature thus far has focused on this direct cost-benefit assessment, examining how privacy regulations have affected various market outcomes. However, an increasing body of theory work emphasizes externalities related to data flows. These externalities, both positive and negative, suggest benefits to the targeted regulation of digital privacy.
30943.zh_abstract: 媒体和监管讨论中对隐私的关注日益增加。这是数字数据实用性增强的结果。文献强调了数字数据流对消费者和企业的收益与成本。收益以数据驱动的创新、更符合消费者需求的高质量产品和服务以及利润增长的形式出现。成本则与隐私的内在价值和工具性价值相关。在标准经济假设下，这种成本收益权衡的框架可能表明，除了在稳健的竞争环境中确保消费者得到充分知情外，监管的作用微乎其微。迄今为止的实证文献主要关注这种直接的成本收益评估，考察隐私法规如何影响各种市场结果。然而，越来越多的理论工作强调了与数据流相关的外部性。这些外部性，无论是正面的还是负面的，都表明对数字隐私进行有针对性的监管是有益的。

30942.title: To Starve or to Stoke? Understanding Whether Divestment vs. Investment Can Steer (Green) Innovation
30942.zh_title: 是扼杀还是激励？理解撤资与投资能否引导（绿色）创新
30942.abstract: More than 1,500 organizations and investors representing over $\$40$ trillion in assets have committed to fossil fuel divestment to combat climate change. Will it work? This chapter explores whether divestment might induce green innovation, a critical component of transitioning to a cleaner economy. Divestment could theoretically steer innovation by increasing the cost of capital for "dirty firms," but it is unclear whether the effects will be large enough to significantly reduce investment opportunities. I argue that continuing to invest in dirty industries could drive green innovation conditional on investors being socially-conscious and governing through "voice." This hinges upon understanding which firm strategies actually foster green innovation, though, and the commonly-used ESG indicators come with several limitations. I demonstrate how decomposing them and using alternative approaches to measuring environmental performance can improve investment, strategy, and management decision-making and policy design. I examine the relationship between 14 specific practices and whether large firms in 16 pollution-intensive sectors are on track for meeting the Paris Agreement emissions targets ("carbon performance"). I find no correlation between carbon performance and the most basic practices, like disclosing emissions, but a positive correlation for five more explicit strategies: setting long-term quantitative emissions targets, having a third party verify emissions data, incorporating environmental performance into executive remuneration policies, supporting governmental climate change efforts, and setting an internal price of carbon. I construct a new best practices score based on these results and find that it has a much higher correlation with carbon performance than some other composite measures.
30942.zh_abstract: 超过1500家组织和投资者，代表超过40万亿美元的资产，已承诺进行化石燃料撤资以应对气候变化。这会奏效吗？本章探讨撤资是否可能引发绿色创新，这是向更清洁经济转型的关键组成部分。理论上，撤资可以通过提高“污染企业”的资本成本来引导创新，但目前尚不清楚其效果是否足以显著减少投资机会。我认为，如果投资者具有社会意识并通过“发声”进行治理，那么继续投资于污染行业反而可能推动绿色创新。然而，这取决于理解哪些企业战略实际上促进了绿色创新，而常用的ESG指标存在若干局限性。我展示了如何分解这些指标以及使用替代方法来衡量环境绩效，从而改进投资、战略、管理决策和政策设计。我考察了16个污染密集型行业中的大型企业，分析了14项具体实践与其是否符合《巴黎协定》排放目标（即“碳绩效”）之间的关系。我发现，碳绩效与最基本实践（如披露排放量）之间没有相关性，但与五项更明确的策略呈正相关：设定长期量化排放目标、由第三方验证排放数据、将环境绩效纳入高管薪酬政策、支持政府气候变化努力以及设定内部碳价格。基于这些结果，我构建了一个新的最佳实践评分，并发现该评分与碳绩效的相关性远高于其他一些综合指标。
30942.meta: Programs：EEE, PR；JEL：G30, O32, O35, Q4, Q5

30941.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Workers’ Expectations and Preferences for Remote Work
30941.zh_title: COVID-19对工人远程工作期望和偏好的影响
30941.authors: Yuting Chen, Patricia Cortés, Gizem Koşar, Jessica Pan, Basit Zafar
30941.abstract: We study how COVID-19 affected the prevalence, expectations, and attitudes toward remote work using specially designed surveys. The incidence of remote work remains higher than pre-pandemic levels and both men and women expect this to persist post-pandemic. Workers also report increased preference for remote work as a result of the pandemic. These changes are strongly correlated with individuals’ exposure to the pandemic induced work-from-home shock, indicating that experience with remote work during the pandemic likely shaped expectations and preferences toward WFH. The magnitude of the effects on preferences and expectations are similar across gender, marital status, and presence of children.
30941.zh_abstract: 我们利用专门设计的调查，研究了COVID-19如何影响远程工作的普及程度、期望和态度。远程工作的发生率仍高于疫情前水平，男性和女性都预计这种情况将在疫情后持续。工人还报告称，由于疫情，他们对远程工作的偏好有所增加。这些变化与个人因疫情引发的居家办公冲击的暴露程度密切相关，表明疫情期间的远程工作经历可能塑造了对WFH的期望和偏好。偏好和期望的影响程度在性别、婚姻状况以及是否有孩子方面相似。

30940.title: Varying Impacts of Letters of Recommendation on College Admissions
30940.zh_title: 推荐信对大学录取的不同影响
30940.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
30940.abstract: In a pilot program during the 2016-17 admissions cycle, the University of California, Berkeley invited many applicants for freshman admission to submit letters of recommendation. This proved controversial within the university, with concerns that this change would further disadvantage applicants from disadvantaged groups. To inform this debate, we use this pilot as the basis for an observational study of the impact of submitting letters of recommendation on subsequent admission, with the goal of estimating how impacts vary across pre-defined subgroups. Understanding this variation is challenging in an observational setting because estimated impacts reflect both actual treatment effect variation and differences in covariate balance across groups. To address this, we develop balancing weights that directly optimize for “local balance” within subgroups while maintaining global covariate balance between treated and control units. Applying this approach to the UC Berkeley pilot study yields excellent local and global balance, unlike more traditional weighting methods, which fail to balance covariates within subgroups. We find that the impact of letters of recommendation increases with applicant strength. However, we find little average difference for applicants from disadvantaged groups, although this result is more mixed. In the end, we conclude that soliciting letters of recommendation from a broader pool of applicants would not meaningfully change the composition of admitted undergraduates.
30940.zh_abstract: 在2016-17学年招生周期的一项试点项目中，加州大学伯克利分校邀请了许多新生申请者提交推荐信。这在大学内部引发了争议，有人担心这一变化会进一步使来自弱势群体的申请者处于不利地位。为了给这场辩论提供信息，我们以此试点为基础，进行了一项关于提交推荐信对后续录取影响的观察性研究，旨在估计影响如何在预定义的子群体间变化。在观察性研究中理解这种变化具有挑战性，因为估计的影响既反映了实际处理效应的差异，也反映了各组间协变量平衡的差异。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了平衡权重，该权重直接优化子组内的“局部平衡”，同时保持处理组和对照组之间的全局协变量平衡。将这种方法应用于加州大学伯克利分校的试点研究，取得了出色的局部和全局平衡，而传统的加权方法则无法在子组内平衡协变量。我们发现，推荐信的影响随着申请者实力的增强而增加。然而，我们发现来自弱势群体的申请者平均差异很小，尽管这一结果更为复杂。最终，我们得出结论，向更广泛的申请者征集推荐信不会显著改变被录取本科生的构成。

30939.title: How the Internet Changed the Market for Print Media
30939.zh_title: 互联网如何改变了印刷媒体市场
30939.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Tarjei Havnes, Jeremy McCauley, Magne Mogstad
30939.abstract: Combining comprehensive data from the Norwegian media market on newspaper circulation, readership, revenues, factor inputs, and product characteristics with plausibly exogenous variation in the availability and adoption of broadband internet, this paper provides causal evidence on how the internet affected the traditional print media market. Household adoption of broadband internet triggered large reductions in print readership and circulation and equally large increases in online news readership. Despite strong substitution from print to online news consumption, newspaper firms’ revenues fell by almost 30%. Newspaper firms responded by dramatically cutting costs, either by shedding labor inputs or by reducing the physical size of newspaper sheets, and in doing so avoided meaningful losses in profits. The printed newspaper product available to customers also changed, as newspapers shifted content away from tabloid to more serious news. This paper offers a case study on how an adverse technology shock transmits through firms with multiple margins of adjustment, and provides an explanation for the economic resilience of newspapers.
30939.zh_abstract: 本文结合挪威媒体市场中关于报纸发行量、读者数量、收入、要素投入和产品特征的全面数据，以及宽带互联网可用性和普及率中看似外生的变化，提供了关于互联网如何影响传统印刷媒体市场的因果证据。家庭采用宽带互联网引发了印刷版读者数量和发行量的大幅下降，以及在线新闻读者数量的同等大幅增长。尽管从印刷新闻消费到在线新闻消费存在强烈的替代效应，报纸公司的收入却下降了近30%。报纸公司通过大幅削减成本来应对，要么裁减劳动力投入，要么减少报纸的物理版面尺寸，从而避免了利润的重大损失。提供给客户的印刷报纸产品也发生了变化，因为报纸将内容从小报转向了更严肃的新闻。本文提供了一个案例研究，说明不利的技术冲击如何通过拥有多种调整手段的企业进行传导，并为报纸的经济韧性提供了解释。

30938.title: Frames, Incentives, and Education: Effectiveness of Interventions to Delay Public Pension Claiming
30938.zh_title: 框架、激励与教育：延迟公共养老金申领的干预措施效果
30938.authors: Franca Glenzer, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Stefan Staubli
30938.abstract: In many retirement income systems, people forgo a higher stream of public pension income by claiming early. We provide both survey-experimental and quasi-experimental evidence that the timing of public pension claiming is relatively inelastic to changes in financial incentives. Using the survey experiment, we evaluate the effect of two different educational interventions and different ways of framing the decision on the present value of participants' expected pension payments. While all three types of interventions induce delays, these interventions have heterogeneous financial consequences. Educating participants leads to claiming ages with higher pension wealth. In contrast, framing and financial incentives do not improve, and even worsen, financial outcomes. Understanding the impact of various policy tools on expected pension wealth is essential for designing policies to delay claiming.
30938.zh_abstract: 在许多退休收入体系中，人们因提前申领而放弃了更高额的公共养老金收入。我们提供了调查实验和准实验证据，表明公共养老金申领时间对财务激励变化的弹性相对较小。通过调查实验，我们评估了两种不同的教育干预措施以及不同的决策框架方式对参与者预期养老金支付现值的影响。虽然所有三种类型的干预措施都导致了延迟，但这些干预措施产生了不同的财务后果。教育参与者导致了具有更高养老金财富的申领年龄。相比之下，框架和财务激励并未改善，甚至恶化了财务结果。理解各种政策工具对预期养老金财富的影响，对于设计延迟申领的政策至关重要。

30937.title: The Cyclicality of Births and Babies’ Health, Revisited: Evidence from Unemployment Insurance
30937.zh_title: 出生率的周期性与婴儿健康再探：来自失业保险的证据
30937.authors: Lisa J. Dettling, Melissa Schettini Kearney
30937.abstract: We revisit the cyclical nature of birth rates and infant health and investigate to what extent the relationship between aggregate labor market conditions and birth outcomes is mitigated by the consumption smoothing income assistance delivered through unemployment insurance (UI). We introduce a novel empirical test of standard neoclassical models of fertility that directly tests the prediction of opposite-signed income and intertemporal substitution effects of business cycles by examining the interaction of the aggregate unemployment rate with a measure of potential income replacement from UI. Our results show that as UI benefit generosity reaches 100 percent income replacement, there is no effect of the unemployment rate on fertility rates. This implies that the well-documented cyclical nature of fertility rates is about access to liquidity. We also provide novel evidence that infant health is countercyclical based on timing of conception, but procyclical based on time in utero. The negative relationship between the in utero aggregate unemployment rate and infant health also disappears when potential UI replacement rates reach 100 percent. Our results indicate that the social insurance provided by UI has a pro-natalist effect and improves babies’ health.
30937.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了出生率和婴儿健康的周期性特征，并研究了失业保险提供的收入平滑援助在多大程度上缓解了总体劳动力市场状况与生育结果之间的关系。我们引入了一种新颖的实证检验方法，用于检验标准新古典主义生育模型，该方法通过考察总体失业率与失业保险潜在收入替代率衡量指标之间的交互作用，直接检验了商业周期中收入效应和跨期替代效应符号相反的预测。我们的结果表明，当失业保险福利慷慨程度达到100%的收入替代率时，失业率对生育率没有影响。这意味着，有充分证据表明的生育率周期性特征与流动性获取有关。我们还提供了新的证据，表明基于受孕时间，婴儿健康是逆周期的，但基于子宫内时间，则是顺周期的。当潜在的失业保险替代率达到100%时，子宫内总体失业率与婴儿健康之间的负相关关系也消失了。我们的结果表明，失业保险提供的社会保险具有促进生育的效果，并改善了婴儿的健康状况。
30937.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, I18, J11, J13, J18

30936.title: Does School Choice Increase Crime?
30936.authors: Andrew Bibler, Stephen B. Billings, Stephen Ross
30936.abstract: While prior evidence suggests that school choice lottery winners have lower adult criminality, there is little evidence on how school choice lotteries impact non-applicants. We leverage variation in actual lottery winners, conditional on expected lottery winners, to link the displacement of middle school peers to adult criminal outcomes. We find that non-applicant, lower-risk boys are more likely to be arrested as adults when lottery applicants from their neighborhood do not attend their assigned middle school. Our estimated effects of an applicant’s departure on students left behind are similar in magnitude to the positive effects experienced by a lottery winner.
30936.zh_abstract: 尽管先前的证据表明，通过择校抽签获得入学资格的学生成年后犯罪率较低，但关于择校抽签如何影响非申请者的证据却很少。我们利用实际抽签中签者的变化（在控制预期中签者的条件下），将初中同学的流失与成年后的犯罪结果联系起来。研究发现，当来自同一社区的中签者未就读其被分配的初中时，那些非申请者中风险较低的男孩在成年后更有可能被捕。我们估计，中签者离开对留守学生的影响程度，与中签者自身获得的积极效应在量级上相似。

30935.title: On the Effectiveness of Foreign Exchange Reserves During the 2021-22 U.S. Monetary Tightening Cycle
30935.zh_title: 2021-2022年美国货币紧缩周期中外汇储备的有效性
30935.authors: Rashad Ahmed, Joshua Aizenman, Jamel Saadaoui, Gazi Salah Uddin
30935.abstract: This paper examines whether the size of foreign exchange (FX) reserves can explain cross-country differences in foreign currency depreciation observed over the 2021-22 Federal Reserve monetary policy tightening that led to a sharp appreciation of the US dollar. Across a broad sample of countries, we document that an additional 10 percentage points of FX reserves/GDP held ex-ante were associated with 1.5 to 2 percent less exchange rate depreciation and this buffer effect was larger among less financially developed economies. Effects were more pronounced for large-reserve countries that sold reserves to intervene than for large-reserve countries that did not intervene, lending support to the presence of both balance sheet and intervention channels. Higher ex-ante policy rates were also associated with less depreciation especially among financially open economies. An analysis of daily currency movements following the June 2021 FOMC meeting corroborates these results. These findings suggest that FX reserves may promote monetary policy independence in the presence of global spillovers.
30935.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在2021-2022年美联储货币政策紧缩（导致美元大幅升值）期间，外汇储备规模能否解释各国本币贬值幅度的差异。在涵盖广泛国家的样本中，我们发现，事前持有的外汇储备占GDP比重每增加10个百分点，与汇率贬值幅度减少1.5%至2%相关，且这一缓冲效应在金融欠发达经济体中更为显著。对于拥有大量储备并出售储备进行干预的国家，其效应比拥有大量储备但未干预的国家更为明显，这支持了资产负债表渠道和干预渠道同时存在的观点。事前较高的政策利率也与较小的贬值幅度相关，尤其是在金融开放的经济体中。对2021年6月联邦公开市场委员会会议后每日汇率变动的分析进一步证实了这些结果。这些发现表明，在全球溢出效应存在的情况下，外汇储备可能有助于促进货币政策独立性。

30934.title: Preferences for Firearms and Their Implications for Regulation
30934.zh_title: 对枪支的偏好及其对监管的启示
30934.authors: Sarah Moshary, Bradley Shapiro, Sara Drango
30934.abstract: This paper estimates consumer demand for firearms with the aim of predicting the likely impacts of firearm regulations on the number and types of guns in circulation. We first conduct a stated-choice-based conjoint analysis and estimate an individual-level demand model for firearms. We validate our estimates using aggregate moments from observational data. Next, we use our estimates to simulate changes in the number and types of guns in circulation under alternative regulations. Importantly, we find that bans or restrictions that specifically target “assault weapons” increase demand for handguns, which are associated with the vast majority of firearm-related violence. We provide distributions of consumer surplus under counterfactuals and discuss how those distributions could be useful for crafting policy.
30934.zh_abstract: 本文估计了消费者对枪支的需求，旨在预测枪支法规对流通中枪支数量和类型的可能影响。我们首先进行了一项基于陈述选择的联合分析，并估计了个人层面的枪支需求模型。我们利用观测数据中的总体矩对估计结果进行了验证。接着，我们利用估计结果模拟了在不同法规下流通中枪支数量和类型的变化。重要的是，我们发现，专门针对“攻击性武器”的禁令或限制会增加对手枪的需求，而手枪与绝大多数枪支相关暴力事件有关。我们提供了反事实情境下消费者剩余的分布，并讨论了这些分布如何有助于政策制定。
30934.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, POL；JEL：C11, C83, H23, I18, L50, L51, M31, M38

30933.title: Life After Death: A Field Experiment with Small Businesses on Information Frictions, Stigma, and Bankruptcy
30933.zh_title: 死后余生：关于信息摩擦、污名化与破产的小企业实地实验
30933.authors: Shai Bernstein, Emanuele Colonnelli, Mitchell Hoffman, Benjamin Iverson
30933.abstract: In an RCT with US small businesses, we document that a large share of firms are not well-informed about bankruptcy. Many assume that bankruptcy necessarily entails the death of a business and do not know about Chapter 11, where debts are renegotiated so that the business can continue operating. Firms also exhibit bankruptcy-related stigma, believing that bankruptcy is embarrassing, a sign of failure, and a negative signal to employees and customers. Short educational videos that address information or stigma increase knowledge and decrease stigma, both immediately and durably over 4 months. Videos increase reported interest in using Chapter 11 bankruptcy and increase intended debt and investment. However, we do not observe long-term real effects. A survey of bankruptcy attorneys and judges points to entrepreneurs’ overconfidence and, to a lesser extent, excessive perceived legal fees as first-order frictions explaining the limited real impact of treatments that only address information and stigma.
30933.zh_abstract: 在一项针对美国小企业的随机对照试验中，我们发现很大一部分企业对破产了解不足。许多人认为破产必然意味着企业死亡，并且不了解第11章破产（即通过债务重组使企业得以继续运营）。企业还表现出与破产相关的污名化，认为破产令人尴尬、是失败的标志，并向员工和客户传递负面信号。针对信息或污名化的简短教育视频能够立即且持久地（超过4个月）提高知识水平并减少污名化。这些视频增加了受访者对使用第11章破产的兴趣，并提高了预期的债务和投资水平。然而，我们并未观察到长期的实质性影响。对破产律师和法官的调查表明，企业家的过度自信，以及在较小程度上过高的法律费用感知，是解释仅针对信息和污名化的处理措施产生有限实际影响的首要摩擦因素。
