30932.title: The Benefits of Revealing Race: Evidence from Minority-owned Local Businesses
30932.zh_title: 揭示种族的益处：来自少数族裔本地企业的证据
30932.authors: Abhay Aneja, Michael Luca, Oren Reshef
30932.abstract: Is there latent demand to support Black-owned businesses? To explore, we analyze a new feature that made it easier to identify Black-owned restaurants on a large online platform. We find that labeling restaurants as “Black-owned” increased customer engagement and firm performance, as measured by online traffic, calls, orders, and in person visits. These effects are most pronounced in left-leaning areas characterized by lower bias against racial minorities, as measured by regional variation in voting patterns and IAT scores. Restaurants that receive the label also see an increase in the fraction of reviews that are left by White customers.
30932.zh_abstract: 是否存在支持黑人拥有的企业的潜在需求？为了探究这一点，我们分析了一个大型在线平台上的新功能，该功能使得识别黑人拥有的餐厅变得更加容易。我们发现，将餐厅标记为“黑人拥有”增加了客户参与度和企业绩效，具体表现为在线流量、电话、订单和到店访问量的增加。这些效应在左倾地区最为显著，这些地区的特点是（根据投票模式和内隐联想测验分数的地区差异衡量）对少数族裔的偏见较低。获得该标签的餐厅还发现，白人顾客留下的评论比例有所增加。

30931.title: Paying Moms to Stay Home: Short and Long Run Effects on Parents and Children
30931.zh_title: 付钱让妈妈待在家里：对父母和孩子的短期与长期影响
30931.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Tuomas Kosonen, Kristiina Huttunen
30931.abstract: We study the impacts of a policy designed to reward mothers who stay at home rather than join the labor force when their children are under age three. We use regional and over time variation to show that the Finnish Home Care Allowance (HCA) decreases maternal employment in both the short and long term. The effects are large enough for the existence of home care benefit system to explain the higher short-term child penalty in Finland than comparable nations. Home care benefits also negatively affect the early childhood cognitive test results of children, decrease the likelihood of choosing academic high school, and increase youth crimes. We confirm that the mechanism of action is changing work/home care arrangements by studying a day care fee reform that had the opposite effect of raising incentives to work – with corresponding opposite effects on mothers and children compared to HCA. Our findings suggest that shifting child care from the home to the market increases labor force participation and improves child outcomes.
30931.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项旨在奖励在孩子三岁以下时待在家里而非加入劳动力市场的母亲的政策的影响。我们利用地区和时间上的差异表明，芬兰的家庭护理津贴在短期和长期内都降低了母亲的就业率。其影响足够大，以至于家庭护理福利制度的存在可以解释芬兰比同类国家更高的短期育儿惩罚。家庭护理福利还对儿童的早期认知测试结果产生负面影响，降低了选择学术型高中的可能性，并增加了青少年犯罪。通过研究一项日托费用改革（该改革产生了提高工作激励的相反效果，并对母亲和孩子产生了与家庭护理津贴相反的效应），我们确认了其作用机制是改变工作/家庭护理安排。我们的研究结果表明，将儿童保育从家庭转移到市场可以提高劳动力参与率并改善儿童发展结果。

30930.title: Structuring Cash Transfers: Cash Flow Preferences, Seasonality, and Financial Decisions in Rural Kenya
30930.zh_title: 结构化现金转移：肯尼亚农村地区的现金流偏好、季节性与财务决策
30930.authors: Carolina Kansikas, Anandi Mani, Paul Niehaus
30930.abstract: We examine the preferences of low-income households in Kenya over the structure of unconditional cash transfers. Most preferred lumpy transfers, and some preferred deferred receipt—in contrast to the typical structures of safety-net programs, but consistent with evidence on the financial challenges of poverty. Turning to consequences, receiving transfers later in the year raised income 1.5 years later—but willingness to defer receipt was sensitive to small changes in cash flow around the time of decision-making. Taken together, these results illustrate how adapting cash transfer design to the decision-making environment of those in poverty could improve financial choices and outcomes.
30930.zh_abstract: 我们考察了肯尼亚低收入家庭对无条件现金转移支付结构形式的偏好。大多数人偏好一次性大额转移，有些人偏好延迟领取——这与安全网项目的典型结构形成对比，但与关于贫困财务挑战的证据一致。转向后果方面，在一年中较晚时间收到转移支付，使一年半后的收入有所增加——但延迟领取的意愿对决策时点附近现金流的微小变化很敏感。综合来看，这些结果说明了如何根据贫困人口的决策环境调整现金转移支付设计，以改善财务选择和结果。

30929.title: Crowding in Private Quality: The Equilibrium Effects of Public Spending in Education
30929.zh_title: 挤入私立质量：教育公共支出的均衡效应
30929.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Natalie Bau, Jishnu Das, Naureen Karachiwalla, Asim Ijaz Khwaja
30929.abstract: We estimate the equilibrium effects of a public-school grant program administered through school councils in Pakistani villages with multiple public and private schools and clearly defined catchment boundaries. The program was randomized at the village-level, allowing us to estimate its causal impact on the market. Four years after the start of the program, test scores were 0.2 sd higher in public schools. We find evidence of an education multiplier: test scores in private schools were also 0.2 sd higher in treated markets. Consistent with standard models of product differentiation, the education multiplier is greater for those private schools that faced a greater threat to their market power. Accounting for private sector responses increases the program's cost-effectiveness by 85% and affects how a policymaker would target spending. Given that markets with several public and private schools are now pervasive in low- and middle-income countries, prudent policy requires us to account for private sector responses to public policy, both in their design and in their evaluation.
30929.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一项通过学校委员会在巴基斯坦村庄实施的公立学校补助金项目的均衡效应，这些村庄拥有多所公立和私立学校，并有明确的招生区域边界。该项目在村庄层面进行了随机化，使我们能够估计其对市场的因果影响。项目启动四年后，公立学校的考试成绩提高了0.2个标准差。我们发现了教育乘数的证据：在受处理的市场中，私立学校的考试成绩也提高了0.2个标准差。与标准的产品差异化模型一致，对于那些面临更大市场势力威胁的私立学校，教育乘数更大。考虑私营部门的反应，使该项目的成本效益提高了85%，并影响了政策制定者如何确定支出目标。鉴于拥有多所公立和私立学校的市场在中低收入国家已普遍存在，审慎的政策要求我们在设计和评估公共政策时，必须考虑私营部门的反应。
30929.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：H44, H52, I22, I25, I28, O12, O15

30928.title: The Impact of Vertical Integration on Physician Behavior and Healthcare Delivery: Evidence from Gastroenterology Practices
30928.zh_title: 纵向整合对医生行为与医疗服务的影响：来自胃肠病学实践的证据
30928.authors: Soroush Saghafian, Lina D. Song, Joseph P. Newhouse, Mary Beth Landrum, John Hsu
30928.abstract: US healthcare is undergoing a period of substantial change, with many hospitals vertically integrating with physician practices. Such integration could improve quality by promoting care coordination, but could also worsen it by impacting care delivery. Evidence on how physicians alter their behavior from the changes in financial ownership and the incentive structures of the integrated organizations is scant. We examine Medicare patients treated by gastroenterologists, a specialty with a recent increase in vertical integration. Using a causal model and large-scale patient-level national panel data that include 2.6 million patient visits across 5,488 physicians, we examine changes in various measures of care delivery. We find that physicians significantly alter care processes (e.g., in using anesthesia with deep sedation) after they vertically integrate, and that patients' post-procedure complications increase substantially. We provide evidence that the financial incentive structure of the integrated practices is the main reason for the changes in physician behavior, since it discourages the integrated practices from allocating expensive resources to relatively unprofitable procedures. Although integration improves operational efficiency measured by physicians' throughput, it negatively affects quality and overall spending. We note some potential policy levers through which policymakers could mitigate the negative consequences of vertical integration.
30928.zh_abstract: 美国医疗体系正经历重大变革，许多医院与医生诊所进行纵向整合。这种整合可能通过促进护理协调来提高质量，但也可能通过影响医疗服务提供而降低质量。关于医生如何因财务所有权变化及整合组织的激励结构而改变其行为的证据很少。我们研究了由胃肠病医生治疗的Medicare患者，该专科近期纵向整合有所增加。利用包含5488名医生、260万次患者就诊的全国性患者层面面板数据，并采用因果模型，我们考察了医疗服务提供各项指标的变化。我们发现，医生在纵向整合后显著改变了护理流程（例如，在深度镇静麻醉的使用上），且患者术后并发症显著增加。我们提供的证据表明，整合诊所的财务激励结构是医生行为变化的主要原因，因为它阻碍整合诊所将昂贵资源分配给相对不盈利的诊疗项目。尽管整合提高了以医生吞吐量衡量的运营效率，但它对质量和总体支出产生了负面影响。我们指出了一些潜在的政策杠杆，政策制定者可通过这些杠杆减轻纵向整合的负面后果。

30981.title: Automating Automaticity: How the Context of Human Choice Affects the Extent of Algorithmic Bias
30981.zh_title: 自动化自动性：人类选择背景如何影响算法偏见的程度
30981.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Diag Davenport, Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan
30981.abstract: Consumer choices are increasingly mediated by algorithms, which use data on those past choices to infer consumer preferences and then curate future choice sets. Behavioral economics suggests one reason these algorithms so often fail: choices can systematically deviate from preferences. For example, research shows that prejudice can arise not just from preferences and beliefs, but also from the context in which people choose. When people behave automatically, biases creep in; snap decisions are typically more prejudiced than slow, deliberate ones, and can lead to behaviors that users themselves do not consciously want or intend. As a result, algorithms trained on automatic behaviors can misunderstand the prejudice of users: the more automatic the behavior, the greater the error. We empirically test these ideas in a lab experiment, and find that more automatic behavior does indeed seem to lead to more biased algorithms. We then explore the large-scale consequences of this idea by carrying out algorithmic audits of Facebook in its two biggest markets, the US and India, focusing on two algorithms that differ in how users engage with them: News Feed (people interact with friends' posts fairly automatically) and People You May Know (people choose friends fairly deliberately). We find significant out-group bias in the News Feed algorithm (e.g., whites are less likely to be shown Black friends' posts, and Muslims less likely to be shown Hindu friends' posts), but no detectable bias in the PYMK algorithm. Together, these results suggest a need to rethink how large-scale algorithms use data on human behavior, especially in online contexts where so much of the measured behavior might be quite automatic.
30981.zh_abstract: 消费者选择越来越多地由算法中介，这些算法利用过去选择的数据来推断消费者偏好，然后策划未来的选择集。行为经济学指出了这些算法经常失败的一个原因：选择可能系统性地偏离偏好。例如，研究表明偏见不仅源于偏好和信念，还源于人们做出选择时的背景。当人们自动行事时，偏见就会潜入；仓促的决定通常比缓慢、深思熟虑的决定更具偏见，并可能导致用户自身并未有意识想要或意图的行为。因此，基于自动行为训练的算法可能会误解用户的偏见：行为越自动，错误就越大。我们在实验室实验中实证检验了这些想法，发现更自动的行为确实似乎会导致更具偏见的算法。然后，我们通过对其两个最大市场（美国和印度）的Facebook进行算法审计，探讨了这一想法的大规模后果，重点关注用户参与方式不同的两种算法：新闻推送（人们相当自动地与朋友的帖子互动）和“你可能认识的人”（人们相当审慎地选择朋友）。我们在新闻推送算法中发现了显著的群体外偏见（例如，白人不太可能看到黑人朋友的帖子，穆斯林不太可能看到印度教朋友的帖子），但在PYMK算法中没有发现可检测到的偏见。这些结果共同表明，需要重新思考大规模算法如何使用人类行为数据，尤其是在线上环境中，因为其中大量被测量的行为可能相当自动。
30981.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：A12, D63, D83

30980.title: Mutual Fund Flows and the Supply of Capital in Municipal Financing
30980.zh_title: 共同基金流动与市政融资中的资本供给
30980.authors: Manuel Adelino, Sophia Chiyoung Cheong, Jaewon Choi, Ji Yeol Jimmy Oh
30980.abstract: This paper identifies the impact of fluctuations in the supply of capital from mutual funds on municipal bond financing and makes three contributions to the literature. First, we develop an identification strategy based on the Morningstar rating methodology at the moment that funds reach 5 years in operation. This approach isolates supply-side effects that are orthogonal to both fund and issuer fundamentals and can be applied in a broad range of settings. Second, we show that exogeneous fund flows lead to more municipal bond issuances and raise bond prices, but only when funds, issuers, and underwriters are connected through existing relationships. This result highlights the role of relationship lending in the context of municipal bond financing. Third, our results suggest that municipal bond issuers exploit favorable financing conditions to issue bonds with shorter delays and lower transaction costs, such as non-general-obligation bonds that require no voter approval and non-green bonds. These frictions can limit the impact of capital-supply shocks on municipal financing.
30980.zh_abstract: 本文识别了共同基金资本供给波动对市政债券融资的影响，并对文献做出了三项贡献。首先，我们基于晨星评级方法在基金运营满5年时的特点，开发了一种识别策略。该方法分离出与基金和发行人基本面均正交的供给侧效应，并可广泛应用于多种场景。其次，我们表明，外生的基金流动会导致更多的市政债券发行并推高债券价格，但这仅当基金、发行人和承销商通过现有关系连接时才成立。这一结果突显了关系贷款在市政债券融资背景下的作用。第三，我们的结果表明，市政债券发行人利用有利的融资条件，发行延迟更短、交易成本更低的债券，例如无需选民批准的非一般义务债券和非绿色债券。这些摩擦可能限制资本供给冲击对市政融资的影响。

30979.title: The Nature of Long-Term Unemployment: Predictability, Heterogeneity and Selection
30979.zh_title: 长期失业的本质：可预测性、异质性与选择效应
30979.abstract: This paper studies the predictability of long-term unemployment (LTU) using rich administrative data from Sweden. We establish substantial heterogeneity in LTU risk across individuals, accounting for both observed and unobserved heterogeneity using a wide range of observable predictors and multiple spell outcomes respectively. We apply our prediction algorithm to study the dynamics of job finding over the unemployment spell and the business cycle. Selection effects can explain most of the decline in average job finding over the unemployment spell, but little of its cyclicality. We also find sizeable heterogeneity in the profiles of job finding over the unemployment spell, but not so over the business cycle.
30979.zh_abstract: 本文利用瑞典丰富的行政数据研究长期失业的可预测性。我们通过分别使用广泛的可观测预测因子和多次失业结局，来考虑观测和未观测的异质性，从而确立了不同个体之间长期失业风险的显著异质性。我们应用预测算法来研究失业期间和工作周期中工作寻找的动态变化。选择效应可以解释失业期间平均工作寻找率下降的大部分原因，但对其周期性变化解释甚少。我们还发现，在失业期间的工作寻找率轨迹上存在相当大的异质性，但在工作周期中则不然。

30978.title: Relational Contracts: Recent Empirical Advancements and Open Questions
30978.zh_title: 关系契约：近期实证进展与未解问题
30978.abstract: Relational contracts - informal self-enforcing agreements sustained by repeated interactions - are ubiquitous both within and across organizational boundaries. This review highlights recent empirical contributions in selected areas. We begin by reviewing some recent work that explicitly takes the dynamic incentive compatibility constraints that underpin relational contract models to the data. We then discuss the relationship between relational contracting and firms' performance. We conclude pointing in directions that we consider to be particularly ripe for future work.
30978.zh_abstract: 关系契约——由重复互动维持的非正式自我执行协议——在组织边界内外无处不在。本综述重点介绍了选定领域的最新实证贡献。我们首先回顾了一些近期工作，这些工作明确地将支撑关系契约模型的动态激励相容约束应用于数据。然后，我们讨论了关系契约与企业绩效之间的关系。最后，我们指出了我们认为特别适合未来研究的方向。

30977.title: The Slow Diffusion of Earnings Inequality
30977.zh_title: 收入不平等的缓慢扩散
30977.abstract: Over the last several decades, rising pay dispersion between firms accounts for the majority of the dramatic increase in earnings inequality in the United States. This paper shows that a distinct cross-cohort pattern drives this rise: newer cohorts of firms enter more dispersed and stay more dispersed throughout their lives. A similar cohort pattern drives a variety of other closely related facts: increases in worker sorting across firms on the basis of pay, education, and age, and increasing productivity dispersion across firms. We discuss two important implications. First, these cohort patterns suggest a link between changes in firm entry associated with the decline in business dynamism and the rise in earnings inequality. Second, cohort effects imply a slow diffusion of inequality: we expect inequality to continue to rise as older and more equal cohorts of firms are replaced by younger and more unequal cohorts. Back of the envelope calculations suggest that this momentum could be substantial with increases in between-firm inequality in the next two decades almost as large as in the last two.
30977.zh_abstract: 在过去的几十年里，美国收入不平等急剧上升，其中企业间薪酬差异的扩大是主要原因。本文表明，一种独特的跨队列模式驱动了这一上升：较新的企业队列在进入时更加分散，并且在其整个生命周期中保持更加分散。类似的队列模式还驱动了其他一系列密切相关的事实：基于薪酬、教育和年龄的工人跨企业分类增加，以及企业间生产率差异的扩大。我们讨论了两个重要含义。首先，这些队列模式表明，与商业活力下降相关的企业进入变化与收入不平等加剧之间存在联系。其次，队列效应意味着不平等的缓慢扩散：我们预计不平等将继续上升，因为更老、更平等的企业队列将被更年轻、更不平等的企业队列所取代。粗略计算表明，这种势头可能相当大，未来二十年企业间不平等的增幅几乎与过去二十年一样大。

30976.title: Similarities and Differences in the Adoption of General Purpose Technologies
30976.zh_title: 通用目的技术采纳中的相似性与差异性
30976.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
30976.abstract: Economic models provide little insight into when the next big idea and its associated productivity dividend will come along. Once a general purpose technology (GPT) is identified, the economist’s toolkit does provide an understanding when firms will adopt a new technology and for what purpose. The focus of the literature has been on commonalities across each type of GPT. This focus is natural, given that the goal of the literature has been to identify generalizable insights across technologies. Broadly, this literature emphasizes heterogeneity in co-invention costs across firms. Each GPT, however, provides a distinct benefit. Steam provided a new power source. The internet facilitated communication. The differences between GPTs are important for understanding adoption patterns. Using the examples of the internet and artificial intelligence, we discuss how both co-invention costs and distinct benefits determine the adoption of technology. For both technologies, we demonstrate that discussions of the impact of a GPT on productivity and growth need to emphasize the benefits as well as the costs. The goal of this paper is therefore to link the literature on co-invention costs with an understanding of the distinct benefits of each GPT.
30976.zh_abstract: 经济模型对于下一个重大创意及其带来的生产率红利何时出现几乎无法提供洞见。然而，一旦某种通用目的技术（GPT）被识别出来，经济学工具箱确实能够帮助理解企业何时以及为何采纳新技术。现有文献的焦点在于各类GPT之间的共性。鉴于该领域的目标是识别跨技术的可推广洞见，这种聚焦是自然的。总体而言，这些文献强调企业间共同发明成本的异质性。然而，每种GPT都提供了独特的益处：蒸汽提供了新的动力源，互联网促进了沟通。GPT之间的差异对于理解采纳模式至关重要。以互联网和人工智能为例，我们讨论了共同发明成本和独特益处如何共同决定技术的采纳。对于这两种技术，我们论证了关于GPT对生产率和增长影响的讨论需要同时强调收益与成本。因此，本文的目标是将关于共同发明成本的文献与对每种GPT独特益处的理解联系起来。

30975.title: Government Audits
30975.authors: Martina Cuneo, Jetson Leder-Luis, Silvia Vannutelli
30975.abstract: Audits are a common mechanism used by governments to monitor public spending. In this paper, we discuss the effectiveness of auditing with theory and empirics. In our model, the value of audits depends on both the underlying presence of abuse and the government’s ability to observe it and enforce punishments, making auditing most effective in middling state-capacity environments. Consistent with this theory, we survey all the existing credibly causal studies and show that government audits seem to have positive effects mostly in middle-state-capacity environments like Brazil. We present new empirical evidence from American city governments, a high-capacity and low-impropriety environment. Using a previously unexplored threshold in federal audit rules and a dynamic regression discontinuity framework, we estimate the effects of these audits on American city finance and find no marginal effect of audits.
30975.zh_abstract: 审计是政府用于监督公共支出的常见机制。在本文中，我们结合理论与实证研究讨论审计的有效性。在我们的模型中，审计的价值既取决于滥用行为的潜在存在程度，也取决于政府观察滥用行为并执行惩罚的能力，这使得审计在中等国家能力环境中最为有效。与这一理论一致，我们调查了所有现有的可信因果研究，并表明政府审计似乎在中等国家能力环境（如巴西）中大多产生积极效果。我们提供了来自美国城市政府（一个高能力、低不当行为的环境）的新实证证据。利用联邦审计规则中一个此前未被探索的阈值以及动态断点回归框架，我们估计了这些审计对美国城市财政的影响，并发现审计没有边际效应。

30974.title: Effects of Enhanced Legal Aid in Child Welfare: Evidence from a Randomized Trial of Mi Abogado
30974.zh_title: 增强儿童福利领域法律援助的效果：来自Mi Abogado随机试验的证据
30974.authors: Ryan Cooper, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Andrés P. Hojman
30974.abstract: Children spend years in foster care, and there are concerns that bureaucratic hurdles contribute to unnecessarily long stays. In a novel approach to policy making, the Chilean government randomized the introduction of a program aimed at reducing these delays in order to evaluate its effects on child well-being. Mi Abogado (My Lawyer) provides legal aid and social services to foster children living in institutions. Using administrative data linked across government registries, we find the program reduced the length of stay in foster care with no increase in subsequent placement, resulting in savings that are substantially greater than the cost of the program. The program also led to a reduction in criminal justice involvement and an improvement in school attendance. The results demonstrate that investment in the quality of foster care services can improve child well-being.
30974.zh_abstract: 儿童在寄养机构中度过数年，人们担忧官僚障碍导致不必要的长期寄养。智利政府采用一种新颖的政策制定方法，随机引入一项旨在减少这些延迟的项目，以评估其对儿童福祉的影响。Mi Abogado（我的律师）为生活在机构中的寄养儿童提供法律援助和社会服务。利用跨政府登记册关联的行政数据，我们发现该项目缩短了寄养时长，且未增加后续安置，节省的成本远超项目支出。该项目还导致刑事司法介入减少，并改善了学校出勤率。结果表明，投资于寄养服务质量可以改善儿童福祉。
30974.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H4, K40

30973.title: Behavioral Economics in Education Market Design: A Forward-Looking Review
30973.zh_title: 教育市场设计中的行为经济学：前瞻性综述
30973.abstract: The rational-choice framework for modeling matching markets has been tremendously useful in guiding the design of school-assignment systems. Despite this success, a large body of work documents deviations from the predictions of this framework that appear influenced by behavioral-economic phenomena. We review these findings and the body of behavioral theories that have been presented as possible explanations. Motivated by this literature, we lay out paths for behavioral economists to be directly useful to education market design.
30973.zh_abstract: 用于建模匹配市场的理性选择框架在指导学校分配系统设计方面极为有用。尽管取得了这一成功，大量研究记录了与该框架预测的偏离，这些偏离似乎受到行为经济学现象的影响。我们回顾了这些发现以及作为可能解释提出的行为理论体系。受此文献启发，我们提出了行为经济学家直接助力教育市场设计的路径。

30972.title: Cross-State Strategic Voting
30972.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Joseph Engelberg, Runjing Lu, William Mullins
30972.abstract: We estimate that 3.1% of US voters, or 6.1 million individuals, were registered to vote in two states in 2020, opening up the possibility for them to choose where to vote. Double registrants are concentrated in the wealthiest zipcodes and respond to both incentives and costs, disproportionately choosing to vote in swing states (higher incentive) and states which automatically send out mail-in ballots (lower cost). We call this behavior Cross-State Strategic Voting. While others have documented strategic incentives on who to vote for, this paper is the first to consider strategic incentives on where to vote.
30972.zh_abstract: 我们估计，2020年有3.1%的美国选民（即610万人）在两个州注册投票，这为他们选择投票地点提供了可能性。双重注册者集中在最富裕的邮政编码区，并对激励和成本均做出反应，他们不成比例地选择在摇摆州（更高激励）和自动邮寄选票的州（更低成本）投票。我们将这种行为称为跨州策略性投票。虽然已有文献记录了关于投票给谁的战略激励，但本文首次考虑了关于投票地点的战略激励。

30971.title: State-Dependent Local Projections: Understanding Impulse Response Heterogeneity
30971.zh_title: 状态依赖的局部投影：理解脉冲响应异质性
30971.authors: James Cloyne, Òscar Jordà, Alan M. Taylor
30971.abstract: An impulse response is the dynamic average effect of an intervention across horizons. We use the well-known Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition to explore a response’s heterogeneity over time and over states of the economy. This can be implemented with a simple extension to the usual local projection specification that nevertheless keeps the model linear in parameters. Using our new decomposition-based approach, we show how to unpack heterogeneity in the fiscal multiplier, an object that at any point in time may depend on a number of potentially correlated factors, including existing economic conditions and the monetary response. In our application, the fiscal multiplier varies considerably with monetary policy: it can be as small as zero, or as large as 2, depending on the degree of monetary offset.
30971.zh_abstract: 脉冲响应是干预在不同时间跨度上的动态平均效应。我们利用著名的Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca分解来探索响应随时间和经济状态的异质性。这可以通过对通常的局部投影设定进行简单扩展来实现，同时保持模型在参数上的线性。利用我们基于分解的新方法，我们展示了如何解析财政乘数的异质性——该乘数在任何时点都可能取决于多个潜在相关因素，包括现有经济状况和货币响应。在我们的应用中，财政乘数随货币政策显著变化：根据货币抵消程度的不同，它可能小至零，也可能大至2。
30971.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C54, C99, E32, E62, H20, H5

30970.title: Lottery-Based Evaluations of Early Education Programs: Opportunities and Challenges for Building the Next Generation of Evidence
30970.zh_title: 基于抽签的早期教育项目评估：构建下一代证据的机遇与挑战
30970.authors: Christina Weiland, Rebecca Unterman, Susan Dynarski, Rachel Abenavoli, Howard Bloom, Breno Braga, Ann-Marie Faria, Erica H. Greenberg, Brian Jacob, Jane Arnold Lincove, Karen Manship, Meghan McCormick, Luke Miratrix, Tomás E. Monarrez, Pamela Morris-Perez, Anna Shapiro, Jon Valant, Lindsay Weixler
30970.abstract: Lottery-based identification strategies offer potential for generating the next generation of evidence on U.S. early education programs. Our collaborative network of five research teams applying this design in early education and methods experts has identified six challenges that need to be carefully considered in this next context: 1) available baseline covariates may not be very rich; 2) limited data on the counterfactual; 3) limited and inconsistent outcome data; 4) weakened internal validity due to attrition; 5) constrained external validity due to who competes for oversubscribed programs; and 6) difficulties answering site-level questions with child-level randomization. We offer potential solutions to these six challenges and concrete recommendations for the design of future lottery-based early education studies.
30970.zh_abstract: 基于抽签的识别策略为生成美国早期教育项目的下一代证据提供了潜力。我们由五个应用该设计的研究团队和方法专家组成的合作网络，识别出在此新背景下需要仔细考虑的六个挑战：1）可用的基线协变量可能不够丰富；2）反事实数据有限；3）结果数据有限且不一致；4）因损耗导致内部有效性减弱；5）因谁竞争超额订阅项目导致外部有效性受限；6）用儿童层面的随机化回答项目层面问题的困难。我们为这六个挑战提供了潜在解决方案，并为未来基于抽签的早期教育研究设计提出了具体建议。

30969.title: Behavior Mediates the Health Effects of Extreme Wildfire Smoke Events
30969.zh_title: 行为调节极端野火烟雾事件的健康影响
30969.authors: Sam Heft-Neal, Carlos F. Gould, Marissa Childs, Mathew V. Kiang, Kari Nadeau, Mark Duggan, Eran Bendavid, Marshall Burke
30969.abstract: Air pollution is known to negatively affect a range of health outcomes. Wildfire smoke is an increasingly important contributor to air pollution, yet extreme smoke events are highly salient and could induce behavioral responses that alter health impacts. We combine geolocated data covering the near universe of 127 million emergency department (ED) visits in California with estimates of daily surface wildfire smoke PM2.5 concentrations and quantify how increasingly acute wildfire smoke events affect ED visits. Low or moderate levels of ambient smoke increase total visits by 1-1.5% in the week following exposure, but extreme smoke days reduce total visits by 6-9%, relative to a day with no smoke. Reductions persist for at least a month. Declines during extreme exposures are driven by diagnoses not thought to be acutely impacted by pollution, including accidental injuries, and come disproportionately from less insured populations. In contrast, health outcomes with the strongest physiological link to short-term air pollution increase dramatically: ED visits for asthma, COPD, and cough all increase by 30-110% in the week after one extreme smoke day. Because low and moderate smoke days vastly outweigh extreme smoke days in our sample, we estimate that smoke exposure was responsible for roughly 3,000 additional ED visits per year in CA from 2006-2017.
30969.zh_abstract: 已知空气污染对一系列健康结果产生负面影响。野火烟雾是空气污染日益重要的来源，然而极端烟雾事件高度显著，可能引发改变健康影响的行为反应。我们结合覆盖加州近1.27亿次急诊就诊的地理定位数据与每日地表野火烟雾PM2.5浓度估计值，量化日益严重的野火烟雾事件如何影响急诊就诊。低或中等水平的烟雾暴露在暴露后一周内使总就诊量增加1-1.5%，但极端烟雾日相对于无烟日使总就诊量减少6-9%。这种减少持续至少一个月。极端暴露期间的下降主要由被认为不受污染急性影响的诊断（包括意外伤害）驱动，且不成比例地来自保险覆盖较少的人群。相比之下，与短期空气污染生理联系最强的健康结果急剧增加：一次极端烟雾日后一周内，哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺病和咳嗽的急诊就诊量均增加30-110%。由于在我们的样本中低和中等烟雾日远超极端烟雾日，我们估计2006-2017年间，烟雾暴露每年在加州导致约3000次额外急诊就诊。

30968.title: Pediatric Drug Adherence and Parental Attention: Evidence from Comprehensive Claims Data
30968.zh_title: 儿科药物依从性与父母关注：来自综合索赔数据的证据
30968.authors: Josh Feng, Matthew J. Higgins, Elena Patel
30968.abstract: Using comprehensive U.S. drug claims data, we show that adherence to asthma control medication declined during the COVID-19 pandemic. We find that young children exhibited a 40 percent decrease in adherence by the end of 2020. The responses were less negative for older children and positive for adults. We provide additional evidence that parental attention played a role in driving this decrease, based on heterogeneity by pre-pandemic mail order usage and the number of parental scripts. Policy implications for improving pediatric adherence are discussed.
30968.zh_abstract: 利用美国全面的药物索赔数据，我们显示在COVID-19大流行期间，哮喘控制药物的依从性有所下降。我们发现，到2020年底，幼儿的依从性下降了40%。年龄较大儿童的反应负面程度较小，而成年人的反应则为正面。基于大流行前邮购使用情况和父母处方数量的异质性，我们提供了额外证据表明父母关注在推动这一下降中发挥了作用。本文讨论了改善儿科药物依从性的政策含义。

30967.title: RIM-Based Value Premium and Factor Pricing Using Value-Price Divergence
30967.zh_title: 基于剩余收益模型的价值溢价与使用价值-价格偏离的因子定价
30967.authors: Lin William Cong, Nathan Darden George, Guojun Wang
30967.abstract: We document that value-to-price, the ratio of Residual-Income-Model-based valuation to market price, subsumes the power of book-to-market ratio and many other value or quality measures in predicting stock returns. Long-short value-to-price portfolios hedge against momentum, revitalize the seemingly missing value premium over past decades, and generate significant returns after adjusting for common factors. The value-price-divergence (VPD) factor constructed from the average returns of these portfolios within small and big stocks is not spanned by these known factors. Max Sharpe ratio and constrained R-squared tests reveal that VPD is a better substitute for the traditional value factor and a four-factor model using the VPD, market, momentum, and size factors outperforms most extant benchmarks in explaining the cross-section of expected equity returns. The findings remain robust under alternative specifications of equity cost of capital.
30967.zh_abstract: 我们证明，价值-价格比（基于剩余收益模型的估值与市场价格之比）在预测股票收益方面吸收了账面市值比以及许多其他价值或质量指标的能力。多空价值-价格投资组合对冲了动量效应，重振了过去几十年看似缺失的价值溢价，并在调整常见因子后产生了显著收益。由这些投资组合在小型和大型股票中的平均收益构建的价值-价格偏离（VPD）因子并未被这些已知因子所涵盖。最大夏普比率和约束R平方检验表明，VPD是传统价值因子的更好替代品，而使用VPD、市场、动量与规模因子的四因子模型在解释预期股票收益的横截面方面优于大多数现有基准。在股权资本成本的不同设定下，这些发现依然稳健。

30966.title: Cooling Externality of Large-Scale Irrigation
30966.zh_title: 大规模灌溉的降温外部性
30966.abstract: We provide novel evidence that large-scale irrigation heterogeneously shifts the temperature distribution towards cooler temperatures during the months of the growing season relative to the rest of the year. We employ a triple-difference estimator using a 59-year-long panel of weather records paired with the fraction of a county that is irrigated in 393 counties over the Ogallala aquifer. Cooling-by-irrigation propagates downwind and reduces the upper tail of the temperature distribution by up to 3C (5F) during the month of August, which has positive externalities on downwind crop yields ($\$120$ million per year) and temperature-induced excess mortality ($\$240$ million per year) that are of equal magnitude as the direct benefits of irrigation by enhancing heat tolerance ($\$440$ million per year). The observed cooling helps explain why the US has seen less warming, especially of very hot temperatures, than what climate models project. Our findings highlight that weather shocks in highly irrigated areas are not exogenous but are influenced by human responses in the form of irrigation.
30966.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的证据，表明大规模灌溉在生长季节的月份相对于一年中其他时间，异质性地将温度分布向更凉爽的温度偏移。我们采用三重差分估计量，使用了59年的天气记录面板数据，并结合奥加拉拉含水层上393个县中每个县的灌溉面积比例。灌溉导致的降温向下风方向传播，并在八月份将温度分布的上尾降低多达3°C（5°F），这对下风方向的作物产量（每年1.2亿美元）和温度诱发的超额死亡率（每年2.4亿美元）产生了正外部性，其规模与通过增强耐热性带来的灌溉直接效益（每年4.4亿美元）相当。观察到的降温有助于解释为什么美国经历的变暖，特别是极端高温的变暖，少于气候模型的预测。我们的发现强调，高度灌溉地区的天气冲击并非外生，而是受到人类以灌溉形式做出的反应的影响。

30965.title: Unconditional Cash Transfers for Families with Children in the U.S.: A Scoping Review
30965.zh_title: 美国对有子女家庭的无条件现金转移支付：一项范围综述
30965.abstract: Children represent the largest indirect beneficiaries of the U.S. social welfare system. Yet, many questions remain about the direct benefits of cash aid to children. The current understanding of the impacts of cash aid in the U.S. is drawn primarily from studies of in-kind benefits, tax credits, and conditional cash aid programs. A corresponding economics literature focuses on the labor supply responses of parents and the role of income, parenting skills, and early education as family investment mechanisms that reduce socioeconomic inequality in children’s well-being. In contrast to the U.S., dozens of low- to middle-income nations use direct cash aid—conditional or unconditional—as a central policy strategy, with demonstrated positive effects across a host of economic and health measures and selected aspects of children’s health and schooling. This paper reviews the economic research on U.S. safety net programs and cash aid to families with children and what existing studies reveal about its impacts on family investment mechanisms and children’s outcomes. We specifically highlight gaps in understanding the impacts of unconditional cash aid on children. We then review nine contemporary unconditional cash transfer programs and discuss their promise and limitations in filling the U.S.-based economic evidence gap about the impact of cash aid on children’s development.
30965.zh_abstract: 儿童是美国社会福利体系中最大的间接受益者。然而，关于现金援助对儿童的直接益处仍有许多问题。目前对美国现金援助影响的理解主要来自对实物福利、税收抵免和有条件现金援助项目的研究。相应的经济学文献侧重于父母的劳动供给反应，以及收入、育儿技能和早期教育作为减少儿童福祉社会经济不平等的家庭投资机制的作用。与美国相反，数十个中低收入国家将直接现金援助（有条件或无条件）作为核心政策策略，并在众多经济和健康指标以及儿童健康和教育的特定方面显示出积极效果。本文回顾了关于美国安全网项目和对有子女家庭现金援助的经济学研究，以及现有研究揭示了这些项目对家庭投资机制和儿童结果的影响。我们特别强调了在理解无条件现金援助对儿童影响方面的空白。然后，我们回顾了九个当代的无条件现金转移支付项目，并讨论了它们在填补美国关于现金援助对儿童发展影响的经济证据空白方面的前景和局限性。
30965.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：H31, H53, H75, I3, I38, J13, J18

30964.title: Parental Education and Invention: The Finnish Enigma
30964.zh_title: 父母教育与发明：芬兰之谜
30964.authors: Philippe Aghion, Ufuk Akcigit, Ari Hyytinen, Otto Toivanen
30964.abstract: Why is invention strongly positively correlated with parental income not only in the US but also in Finland which displays low income inequality and high social mobility? Using data on 1.45M Finnish individuals and their parents, we find that: (i) the positive association between parental income and off-spring probability of inventing is greatly reduced when controlling for parental education; (ii) instrumenting for the parents having a MSc-degree using distance to nearest university reveals a large causal effect of parental education on offspring probability of inventing; and (iii) the causal effect of parental education has been markedly weakened by the introduction in the early 1970s of a comprehensive schooling reform.
30964.zh_abstract: 为什么发明与父母收入呈强烈正相关，不仅在美国如此，在收入不平等程度低且社会流动性高的芬兰也是如此？利用145万芬兰个体及其父母的数据，我们发现：（i）在控制父母教育后，父母收入与子女发明概率之间的正相关关系大幅减弱；（ii）利用到最近大学的距离作为父母拥有硕士学位的工具变量，揭示了父母教育对子女发明概率的巨大因果效应；（iii）20世纪70年代初引入的综合学校教育改革显著削弱了父母教育的因果效应。

30963.title: Beware the Side Effects: Capital Controls, Trade and Misallocation
30963.zh_title: 当心副作用：资本管制、贸易与资源错配
30963.authors: Eugenia Andreasen, Sofía Bauducco, Evangelina Dardati, Enrique G. Mendoza
30963.abstract: Capital controls are an effective credit-management tool but they have serious side effects. Analyzing a dynamic Melitz-OLG model in which firms face credit constraints, we find that capital controls worsen misallocation and hurt exports. Misallocation worsens through static effects that lower capital-labor ratios and raise firm prices. In addition, changes in saving incentives induce dynamic effects and changes in wages, aggregate demand and the real exchange rate cause general equilibrium effects. A quantitative analysis calibrated to Chile’s capital controls of the 1990s yields a sizable worsening in misallocation, with stronger effects on firms that are exporters, more productive, or far from their optimal scales. Exports and the share of exporting firms fall sharply. Rebating the revenue that capital controls may generate or using loan-to-value regulation instead of capital controls results in sharply weaker effects, but slightly tighter capital controls strengthens them significantly. A set of empirical tests applied to Chilean firm-level data provide robust support for the model’s key predictions.
30963.zh_abstract: 资本管制是一种有效的信贷管理工具，但具有严重的副作用。通过分析一个企业面临信贷约束的动态Melitz-OLG模型，我们发现资本管制加剧了资源错配并损害了出口。资源错配通过降低资本劳动比和提高企业价格的静态效应而恶化。此外，储蓄激励的变化引发动态效应，而工资、总需求和实际汇率的变动则产生一般均衡效应。基于20世纪90年代智利资本管制校准的定量分析显示，资源错配显著恶化，对出口企业、生产率较高企业或远离最优规模的企业影响更强。出口和出口企业份额大幅下降。将资本管制可能产生的收入返还给企业，或使用贷款价值比监管替代资本管制，会导致影响显著减弱，但略微收紧资本管制则会显著增强这些影响。一系列应用于智利企业层面数据的实证检验为模型的关键预测提供了有力支持。

30962.title: A Mother’s Voice: Impacts of Spousal Communication Training on Child Health Investments
30962.zh_title: 母亲的声音：配偶沟通培训对儿童健康投资的影响
30962.authors: Martina Bjorkman-Nyqvist, Seema Jayachandran, Celine P. Zipfel
30962.abstract: Building on prior evidence that mothers often have a stronger preference for spending on children than fathers do, we use a randomized experiment to evaluate the impacts of a communication training program for mothers on child health in Uganda. The hypothesis is that the training will enable women to better convey their knowledge and preferences to their husbands and, thereby, boost investments in children's health. We find that the program increases spousal discussion about the family's health, nutrition, and finances. However, this does not increase overall adoption of health-promoting behaviors or improve child anthropometrics. One exception is that the communication training increases women's and children’s intake of protein-rich foods as well as household spending on these foods.
30962.zh_abstract: 基于先前关于母亲通常比父亲更偏好于为孩子支出的证据，我们利用一项随机实验评估了乌干达一项针对母亲的沟通培训项目对儿童健康的影响。假设是，该培训将使女性能够更好地向丈夫传达她们的知识和偏好，从而增加对儿童健康的投资。我们发现，该项目增加了配偶之间关于家庭健康、营养和财务状况的讨论。然而，这并未提高健康促进行为的总体采纳率，也未改善儿童的人体测量指标。一个例外是，沟通培训增加了女性和儿童对富含蛋白质食物的摄入量，以及家庭在这些食物上的支出。

30961.title: Optimal Monetary Policy with Heterogeneous Agents: Discretion, Commitment, and Timeless Policy
30961.zh_title: 异质性代理人下的最优货币政策：相机抉择、承诺与永恒政策
30961.abstract: This paper characterizes optimal monetary policy in a canonical heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with wage rigidity. Under discretion, a utilitarian planner faces the incentive to redistribute towards indebted, high marginal utility households, which is a new source of inflationary bias. With commitment, i) zero inflation is the optimal long-run policy, ii) time-consistent policy requires both inflation and distributional penalties, and iii) the planner trades off aggregate stabilization against distributional considerations, so Divine Coincidence fails. We compute optimal stabilization policy in response to productivity, demand, and cost-push shocks using sequence-space methods, which we extend to Ramsey problems and welfare analysis.
30961.zh_abstract: 本文在一个具有工资刚性的经典异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）模型中刻画了最优货币政策。在相机抉择下，功利主义规划者面临向负债、高边际效用家庭进行再分配的激励，这是一种新的通胀偏差来源。在承诺下，（i）零通胀是最优长期政策，（ii）时间一致的政策需要同时包含通胀惩罚和分配惩罚，（iii）规划者在总体稳定与分配考量之间进行权衡，因此神圣巧合不再成立。我们使用序列空间方法计算了应对生产率、需求和成本推动冲击的最优稳定政策，并将该方法扩展到了拉姆齐问题和福利分析。

30960.title: Immigration, The Long-Term Care Workforce, and Elder Outcomes in the U.S.
30960.zh_title: 移民、长期护理劳动力与美国老年人护理结果
30960.authors: David C. Grabowski, Jonathan Gruber, Brian McGarry
30960.abstract: Although debates over immigration remain contentious, one important sector served heavily by immigrants faces a critical labor shortage: nursing homes. We merge a variety of data sets on immigration and nursing homes and use a shift-share instrumental variables analysis to assess the impact of increased immigration on nursing home staffing and care quality. We show that increased immigration significantly raises the staffing levels of nursing homes in the U.S., particularly in full time positions. We then show that this has an associated very positive effect on patient outcomes, particularly for those who are short stayers at nursing homes, and particularly for immigration of Hispanic staff.
30960.zh_abstract: 尽管关于移民的争论仍然存在争议，但一个严重依赖移民的重要行业正面临严重的劳动力短缺：养老院。我们整合了关于移民和养老院的多个数据集，并使用偏移-份额工具变量分析来评估移民增加对养老院人员配置和护理质量的影响。我们表明，移民增加显著提高了美国养老院的人员配置水平，尤其是在全职岗位上。然后我们证明，这对患者结果产生了非常积极的影响，特别是对于在养老院短期居住的患者，并且尤其体现在西班牙裔员工的移民方面。
30960.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I18, J61

30959.title: A Tractable Income Process for Business Cycle Analysis
30959.zh_title: 适用于商业周期分析的可处理收入过程
30959.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Alisdair McKay, Conor B. Ryan
30959.abstract: We estimate an income process that is consistent with key facts on individual income risk and its variation over the business cycle. In particular, the estimated process generates income fluctuations that display (i) flat and acyclical variance, (ii) volatile and procyclical skewness, (iii) very high kurtosis, and (iv) a moderate rise in cross-sectional inequality over the life cycle, all consistent with the US data. Furthermore, the income process captures the predictable nature of business cycle income risk: income changes during a business cycle episode are partly predicted by income levels before that episode. The estimated process features a time-varying distribution of innovations as well as a factor structure for business cycle exposure. Incorporating the estimated process into a business cycle model adds only one state variable—as in the workhorse persistent-plus-transitory income process—making it a tractable option for modelers.
30959.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个收入过程，该过程与关于个人收入风险及其在商业周期中变化的关键事实一致。具体来说，估计的过程产生的收入波动表现出：(i) 平坦且非周期性的方差，(ii) 波动且顺周期的偏度，(iii) 非常高的峰度，以及 (iv) 生命周期内横截面不平等程度的适度上升，所有这些都与美国数据一致。此外，该收入过程捕捉了商业周期收入风险的可预测性质：商业周期事件期间的收入变化部分可由该事件之前的收入水平预测。估计的过程具有时变的创新分布以及商业周期暴露的因子结构。将估计的过程纳入商业周期模型仅增加一个状态变量——如同常用的持久加暂时收入过程——使其成为建模者一个可处理的选择。
30959.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E3, J31

30993.title: Endogenous Production Networks with Fixed Costs
30993.zh_title: 具有固定成本的内生生产网络
30993.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Ken Kikkawa, Xianglong Kong, Magne Mogstad, Felix Tintelnot
30993.abstract: This paper presents a tractable model of endogenous production networks with fixed costs associated with the formation of links between firms. The model consists of a finite number of firm types producing differentiated products. Each firm is characterized by firm-specific parameters describing its CES production function, firm-specific domestic and foreign demand shifters, and a firm-specific set of potential suppliers and buyers. We consider versions of the model in which either the buyer or the supplier initiates the formation of links, and versions in which the production network can be cyclic or acyclic. Our main theoretical result is that the closed economy equilibrium is unique if the set of feasible networks consists only of networks that are acyclic and the buyer initiates the link formation while having full bargaining power in price negotiations with the supplier. We provide examples of multiple equilibria if the supplier initiates the link formation in both cyclic and acyclic feasible networks or if the buyer initiates the link formation in a cyclic production network. We take the acyclic production network model to Belgian data on firm-to-firm production networks and show that it approximates well the salient features of the network. The endogenous network model generates substantial churn in domestic firm-to-firm linkages in response to trade shocks. However, the endogenous network model generates only moderately different welfare changes compared to a model with fixed linkages, suggesting that exogenous production networks can approximate the welfare response to trade shocks reasonably well.
30993.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个具有固定成本的内生生产网络的可处理模型，该固定成本与企业间链接的形成相关。该模型由有限数量的企业类型组成，这些企业生产差异化产品。每个企业都由描述其CES生产函数的企业特定参数、企业特定的国内和国外需求转移因子，以及企业特定的潜在供应商和买家集合来刻画。我们考虑了模型的几个版本：其中买方或供应商发起链接形成的版本，以及生产网络可以是循环或无环的版本。我们的主要理论结果是，如果可行网络集合仅包含无环网络，并且买方在发起链接形成的同时在与供应商的价格谈判中拥有完全的议价能力，那么封闭经济均衡是唯一的。我们提供了多重均衡的例子：如果供应商在循环和无环可行网络中发起链接形成，或者如果买方在循环生产网络中发起链接形成。我们将无环生产网络模型应用于比利时企业间生产网络的数据，并表明它很好地近似了网络的显著特征。内生网络模型在应对贸易冲击时，国内企业间链接产生了大量的更替。然而，与具有固定链接的模型相比，内生网络模型产生的福利变化仅存在适度差异，这表明外生生产网络可以相当好地近似福利对贸易冲击的反应。

30992.title: Fighting Poverty One Family at a Time: Experimental Evidence from an Intervention with Holistic, Individualized, Wrap-Around Services
30992.zh_title: 逐户扶贫：一项提供整体性、个性化、全方位服务干预的实验证据
30992.authors: William N. Evans, Shawna Kolka, James X. Sullivan, Patrick S. Turner
30992.abstract: Families in poverty face numerous barriers to establishing stable economic footing. This paper examines the effect of a holistic, individualized wrap-around service intervention on outcomes for low-income individuals. The intervention includes a detailed assessment, an individualized service plan, intensive case management administered by a two-person team with small caseloads, and temporary financial assistance used to overcome obstacles to self-sufficiency and incentivize behavior. We evaluate the intervention through a randomized controlled trial among participants seeking assistance at a local social service provider. Results indicate that the program improved labor market and housing outcomes two years after enrollment. Given the customized nature of the services, overall program effects might mask important heterogeneity. Exploratory analysis suggests the program helped employ participants who lacked employment but had stable housing, and that those without stable housing were helped in securing it.
30992.zh_abstract: 贫困家庭在建立稳定的经济基础方面面临众多障碍。本文考察了一项整体性、个性化的全方位服务干预对低收入个体结果的影响。该干预包括详细评估、个性化服务计划、由两人团队管理且个案量较小的强化个案管理，以及用于克服自给自足障碍和激励行为的临时经济援助。我们通过一项随机对照试验来评估该干预措施，试验对象是在当地社会服务提供者处寻求帮助的参与者。结果表明，该计划在注册两年后改善了劳动力市场和住房结果。鉴于服务的定制化性质，总体计划效果可能掩盖重要的异质性。探索性分析表明，该计划帮助了缺乏就业但有稳定住房的参与者找到工作，而那些没有稳定住房的参与者则在获得住房方面得到了帮助。

30991.title: Organizing for Collective Action: Olson Revisited
30991.zh_title: 为集体行动而组织：重访奥尔森
30991.abstract: We study a standard collective action problem in which successful achievement of a group interest requires costly participation by some fraction of its members. How should we model the internal organization of these groups when there is asymmetric information about the preferences of their members? How effective should we expect it to be as we increase the group’s size n? We model it as an optimal honest and obedient communication mechanism and we show that for large n it can be implemented with a very simple mechanism that we call the Voluntary Based Organization. Two new results emerge from this analysis. Independently of the assumptions on the underlying technology, the limit probability of success in the best honest and obedient mechanism is the same as in an unorganized group, a result that is not generally true if obedience is omitted. An optimal organization, however, provides a key advantage: when the probability of success converges to zero, it does so at a much slower rate than in an unorganized group. Because of this, significant probabilities of success are achievable with simple honest and obedient organizations even in very large groups.
30991.zh_abstract: 我们研究一个标准的集体行动问题，其中成功实现群体利益需要其部分成员付出高昂的参与成本。当关于成员偏好的信息不对称时，我们应该如何对这些群体的内部组织进行建模？随着群体规模n的增加，我们应预期其有效性如何？我们将其建模为一个最优的诚实且服从的沟通机制，并证明对于较大的n，它可以通过一个我们称之为自愿型组织的非常简单的机制来实现。从这个分析中得出两个新结果。无论对基础技术做何假设，在最优诚实且服从的机制下成功的极限概率与无组织群体中的相同，如果忽略服从性，这一结果通常不成立。然而，一个最优组织提供了一个关键优势：当成功概率趋近于零时，它是以比无组织群体慢得多的速度趋近的。因此，即使在非常大的群体中，通过简单的诚实且服从的组织也能实现显著的成功概率。

30990.title: Migration Restrictions Can Create Gender Inequality: The Story of China's Left-Behind Children
30990.zh_title: 迁移限制可能造成性别不平等：中国留守儿童的故事
30990.authors: Xuwen Gao, Wenquan Liang, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Ran Song
30990.abstract: About 11% of the Chinese population are rural-urban migrants with a rural hukou that severely restricts their children's access to urban schools. As a result, 69 million children are left behind in rural areas. We use two regression-discontinuity designs - based on school enrollment age cutoffs and a 2014 policy change that more severely restricted migrants' access to schooling - to document that migrants become discontinuously more likely to leave middle-school-aged daughters (but not sons) behind in poor rural areas without either parent present exactly when schooling becomes expensive and restricted. The effect is larger when the daughter has a male sibling. Migrant parents send significantly less remittances back to daughters than sons. Although China's hukou mobility restrictions are not gender-specific in intent, they have larger adverse effects on girls. Rural residents adjacent to cities that experience shocks to labor demand after China's accession to the WTO are more likely to separate from children to take advantage of new opportunities in cities. Those workers earn much more and advance economically, but longitudinal data reveals that their children complete fewer years of schooling, remain poor, and have worse mental and physical health later in life.
30990.zh_abstract: 大约11%的中国人口是城乡移民，他们持有严重限制其子女进入城市学校的农村户口。结果，6900万儿童被留在农村地区。我们利用两个断点回归设计——基于入学年龄截止点和2014年一项更严格限制移民子女入学机会的政策变化——来证明，当教育变得昂贵且受限时，移民父母恰好更有可能将中学年龄的女儿（而非儿子）留在贫困的农村地区，且父母双方均不在身边。当女儿有兄弟时，这种效应更大。移民父母寄给女儿的生活费显著少于儿子。尽管中国的户口迁移限制在意图上并非针对特定性别，但它们对女孩产生了更大的不利影响。在中国加入世贸组织后，邻近城市的农村居民在经历劳动力需求冲击时，更有可能与子女分离，以利用城市的新机会。这些工人收入更高，经济状况得到改善，但纵向数据显示，他们的子女完成的受教育年限更少，仍然贫困，并且在以后的生活中身心健康状况更差。

30989.title: Does the US have an Infrastructure Cost Problem? Evidence from the Interstate Highway System
30989.zh_title: 美国存在基础设施成本问题吗？来自州际公路系统的证据
30989.authors: Matthew Turner, Neil Mehrotra, Juan Pablo Uribe
30989.abstract: We pose the problem of managing the interstate as an optimal capital stock problem and define user cost as the charge per vehicle mile travelled that rationalizes observed investments in lane miles and pavement quality. We find that user cost is the sum of the opportunity cost of lane miles, pavement quality, and depreciation. Each depends on the price of lane miles and pavement quality. We estimate these prices and evaluate user cost. Despite large increases in the price of lane miles and pavement quality, user cost declines almost 50% from 1992-2008 due to lower interest rates and higher usage. Increased materials costs largely explain the increasing price of pavement quality, and we reject several common hypotheses for the increase in the price of lane miles.
30989.zh_abstract: 我们将州际公路的管理问题视为一个最优资本存量问题，并将用户成本定义为每车辆英里行驶里程的收费，该收费使得观察到的车道里程和路面质量投资合理化。我们发现用户成本是车道里程机会成本、路面质量成本和折旧的总和。每一项都取决于车道里程和路面质量的价格。我们估计了这些价格并评估了用户成本。尽管车道里程和路面质量的价格大幅上涨，但由于利率降低和使用量增加，用户成本从1992年到2008年下降了近50%。材料成本的增加在很大程度上解释了路面质量价格的上涨，我们否定了关于车道里程价格上涨的几种常见假设。

30988.title: Long Covid in the United States
30988.abstract: Although yet to be clearly identified as a clinical condition, there is immense concern at the health and wellbeing consequences of long COVID. Using data collected from nearly half a million Americans in the period June 2022-December 2022 in the US Census Bureau’s Household Pulse Survey (HPS), we find 14 percent reported suffering long COVID at some point, half of whom reported it at the time of the survey. It peaks in midlife in the same way as negative affect. Ever having had long COVID is strongly associated with negative affect (anxiety, depression, worry and a lack of interest in things). The effect is larger among those who currently report long COVID, especially if they report severe symptoms. In contrast, those who report having had short COVID report higher wellbeing than those who report never having had COVID. Long COVID is also strongly associated with physical mobility problems, and with problems dressing and bathing. It is also associated with mental problems as indicated by recall and understanding difficulties. Again, the associations are strongest among those who currently report long COVID, while those who said they had had short COVID have fewer physical and mental problems than those who report never having had COVID. Vaccination is associated with lower negative affect, including among those who reported having had long COVID.
30988.zh_abstract: 尽管长期新冠作为一种临床病症尚未被明确识别，但其对健康和福祉的后果引起了极大关注。利用美国人口普查局家庭脉搏调查（HPS）在2022年6月至2022年12月期间从近50万美国人收集的数据，我们发现14%的人报告曾患有长期新冠，其中一半在调查时仍报告有此症状。它在中年时期达到顶峰，与负面情绪类似。曾患长期新冠与负面情绪（焦虑、抑郁、担忧和对事物缺乏兴趣）密切相关。这种效应在目前报告患有长期新冠的人群中更大，尤其是那些报告有严重症状的人。相比之下，报告曾患短期新冠的人比报告从未患过新冠的人幸福感更高。长期新冠还与身体活动能力问题以及穿衣和洗澡问题密切相关。它还与记忆和理解困难等心理问题相关。同样，这些关联在目前报告患有长期新冠的人群中最强，而报告曾患短期新冠的人比报告从未患过新冠的人身体和心理问题更少。疫苗接种与较低的负面情绪相关，包括在报告曾患长期新冠的人群中也是如此。

30987.title: The Welfare Effect of Gender-Inclusive Intellectual Property Creation: Evidence from Books
30987.zh_title: 性别包容性知识产权创造的福利效应：来自图书的证据
30987.abstract: Women have traditionally participated in intellectual property creation at depressed rates relative to men. Book authorship is now an exception. In 1970, women published a third as many books as men. By 2020, women produced the majority of books. Adding new products can have significant welfare benefits, particularly when product quality is unpredictable. Using data on sales of 8.9 million individual titles at Amazon, 2018-2021, along with information on 200 million ratings of 1.8 million books by 800,000 Goodreads users, I develop measures of both the supply of new books by male and female authors, as well as their usage by heterogeneous consumers. I show that growth in female-authored books has delivered a roughly equal proportionate increase in the female-authored shares of consumption, book awards, and other measures of success, indicating both that the additional female-authored books are useful to consumers and that product quality is unpredictable. I calibrate a simple structural model of demand with unpredictable product quality to quantify the welfare benefit from the additional female-authored books. While revenue gains to female authors come partly at the expense of male authors, gains to consumers from inclusive innovation are experienced by a wide range of consumers.
30987.zh_abstract: 传统上，女性在知识产权创造中的参与率低于男性。图书创作现在是一个例外。1970年，女性出版的图书数量是男性的三分之一。到2020年，女性创作了大部分图书。增加新产品可以带来显著的福利收益，尤其是在产品质量不可预测的情况下。利用2018-2021年亚马逊890万种图书的销售数据，以及80万Goodreads用户对180万种图书的2亿条评分信息，我开发了衡量男性和女性作者新书供应量以及不同消费者使用量的指标。我表明，女性作者图书的增长使得女性作者在消费份额、图书奖项和其他成功指标中的占比大致成比例地增加，这表明新增的女性作者图书对消费者有用，并且产品质量不可预测。我校准了一个具有不可预测产品质量的简单需求结构模型，以量化新增女性作者图书带来的福利收益。虽然女性作者的收入增长部分是以男性作者为代价的，但包容性创新带来的消费者收益则由广泛的消费者群体所享有。

30986.title: Obstetric Unit Closures and Racial/Ethnic Disparity in Health
30986.zh_title: 产科病房关闭与种族/民族健康差异
30986.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Xue Wu
30986.abstract: This paper examines whether loss of locally available hospital-based obstetric services affects racial/ethnic disparities in intrapartum care access and birth outcomes in rural areas of the US. To conduct causal inference, we combine difference-in-difference and propensity score matching methods to control for observable and time-invariant unobservable heterogeneity across counties. Using data from Vital Statistics birth certificate records from 2005-2018 from rural counties in the mainland US, our empirical analysis reaches several findings. Women in counties that lost obstetric services are more likely to receive intrapartum care outside their counties of residence and to deliver in an urban county compared to women in matched counties. Nonetheless, there are no consistent effects of obstetric unit closure on maternal and infant health in the full sample. Among Black mothers, however, obstetric unit closure is not associated with delivering in an urban county, and there is a more consistent pattern of negative effects of closure on infant health. Importantly, the adoption of scope-of-practice laws for certified nurse midwives, the adoption of telehealth payment parity laws and the ACA Medicaid expansions have implications for narrowing racial/ethnic disparities in health in response to obstetric unit closures.
30986.zh_abstract: 本文考察了当地可及的医院产科服务丧失是否会影响美国农村地区在产时护理可及性和出生结果方面的种族/民族差异。为了进行因果推断，我们结合了双重差分法和倾向得分匹配法，以控制各县之间可观测和不可观测的时间不变异质性。利用2005-2018年美国本土农村县的生命统计出生证明记录数据，我们的实证分析得出了若干发现。与匹配县的妇女相比，失去产科服务的县的妇女更有可能在其居住县之外接受产时护理，并在城市县分娩。尽管如此，在全样本中，产科病房关闭对孕产妇和婴儿健康没有一致的影响。然而，在黑人母亲中，产科病房关闭与在城市县分娩无关，并且存在更一致的关闭对婴儿健康产生负面影响的模式。重要的是，针对认证护士助产士的执业范围法律、远程医疗支付平价法律的通过，以及ACA医疗补助扩展，对于缩小因产科病房关闭而产生的种族/民族健康差异具有意义。

30985.title: Distortions, Producer Dynamics, and Aggregate Productivity: A General Equilibrium Analysis
30985.zh_title: 扭曲、生产者动态与全要素生产率：一般均衡分析
30985.authors: Stephen Ayerst, Loren Brandt, Diego Restuccia
30985.abstract: In less developed economies the allocation of factor inputs to more productive farms is often hindered. To analyze how distortions to factor reallocation affect farm dynamics and agricultural productivity, we develop a model of heterogeneous farms that make cropping choices and invest in productivity improvements. We calibrate the model using detailed farm-level panel data from Vietnam, exploiting regional differences in agricultural institutions and outcomes. We focus on south Vietnam and quantify the effect of higher measured distortions in the North on farm choices and agricultural productivity. We find that the higher distortions in north Vietnam reduce agricultural productivity by 41%, accounting for 61% of the observed 2.5-fold difference between regions. Moreover, two-thirds of the productivity loss is driven by farms’ choice of lower productivity crops and reductions in productivity-enhancing investment, which more than doubles the productivity loss from static misallocation.
30985.zh_abstract: 在欠发达经济体中，生产要素向更高生产率农场的配置常常受到阻碍。为了分析要素重新配置的扭曲如何影响农场动态和农业生产力，我们构建了一个异质性农场模型，这些农场进行作物选择并投资于生产率改进。我们利用越南详细的农场层面面板数据对模型进行校准，并利用各地区农业制度和产出的差异。我们重点关注越南南方，并量化北方地区较高的测量扭曲对农场选择和农业生产力的影响。我们发现，越南北部较高的扭曲使农业生产力降低了41%，这解释了观察到的地区间2.5倍差异的61%。此外，三分之二的生产力损失源于农场选择较低生产率的作物以及减少提升生产率的投资，这使静态错配造成的生产力损失增加了一倍以上。
30985.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O11, O14, O4, Q12, Q15, Q16

30984.title: Liquidity, Debt Denomination, and Currency Dominance
30984.zh_title: 流动性、债务计价与货币主导地位
30984.authors: Antonio Coppola, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Chenzi Xu
30984.abstract: The international monetary system of the last four centuries has experienced the rise, persistence, and fall of specific currencies as the dominant unit of denomination in global debt contracts. We argue that a liquidity-based theory is necessary to explain this pattern. Firms issue debt that can be extinguished by trading their revenues for financial assets of the same denomination. When asset markets differ in their liquidity, as modeled via endogenous search frictions, firms optimally choose to denominate debt in the unit of the asset that is most liquid. Equilibria with a single dominant currency emerge from a positive feedback cycle whereby issuing in the more liquid denomination endogenously raises the benefits of that denomination. This feedback mechanism has historically been seeded by governments committed to the largest pool of liquid assets in the same denomination. Once a dominant currency emerges, the government hosting the currency endogenously invests more in the liquidity of its financial markets, leading to further entrenchment of that equilibrium. Our theory explains the historical experiences of the Dutch florin, the British pound sterling, the US dollar, and the transitions between them. We rationalize the current dollar-dominant international financial architecture and provide predictions about the potential rise of the Chinese renminbi.
30984.zh_abstract: 过去四个世纪的国际货币体系经历了特定货币作为全球债务合约主导计价单位的兴起、持续和衰落。我们认为，基于流动性的理论对于解释这一模式是必要的。企业发行债务，这些债务可以通过将其收入交易为相同计价单位的金融资产来清偿。当资产市场在流动性方面存在差异时（通过内生搜索摩擦建模），企业会最优地选择以流动性最强的资产单位来计价债务。单一主导货币的均衡源于一个正反馈循环：以流动性更强的计价单位发行债务会内生地提高该计价单位的收益。从历史上看，这种反馈机制是由致力于提供最大规模同计价单位流动性资产的政府所催化的。一旦主导货币出现，该货币所在国政府会内生地增加对其金融市场流动性的投资，从而导致该均衡的进一步巩固。我们的理论解释了荷兰盾、英镑、美元的历史经验以及它们之间的转换。我们为当前美元主导的国际金融架构提供了合理解释，并对人民币的潜在崛起做出了预测。
30984.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E40, F33, G15, N20

30983.title: The Impacts of Same and Opposite Gender Alumni Speakers on Interest in Economics
30983.zh_title: 同性与异性校友演讲者对经济学兴趣的影响
30983.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Gwyn C. Pauley, Joanna Venator, Matthew J. Wiswall
30983.abstract: What is the impact of male and female alumni speaker interventions in introductory microeconomics courses on student interest in economics? Using student-level transcript data, we estimate the effect of speakers on future course-taking in models which use untreated lectures as control groups, including professor and semester fixed effects and student-level covariates. Alumni speakers increase intermediate economics course take-up by 2.1 percentage points (11%). Students are more responsive to same-gender speakers, with male speakers increasing men’s course take-up by 36% and female speakers increasing women’s course take-up by 40%, implying that the effect of alumni speakers is strongly gendered.
30983.zh_abstract: 在经济学导论课程中，男性和女性校友演讲者干预对学生经济学兴趣有何影响？利用学生层面的成绩单数据，我们以未接受演讲者干预的课堂作为对照组，在包含教授和学期固定效应以及学生层面协变量的模型中，估计了演讲者对后续课程选择的影响。校友演讲者使中级经济学课程的选修率提高了2.1个百分点（11%）。学生对同性别的演讲者反应更强烈：男性演讲者使男性的课程选修率提高了36%，而女性演讲者使女性的课程选修率提高了40%，这表明校友演讲者的影响具有强烈的性别差异。

30999.title: When we change the clock, does the clock change us?
30999.zh_title: 当我们改变时钟时，时钟会改变我们吗？
30999.authors: Patrick Baylis, Severin Borenstein, Edward A. Rubin
30999.abstract: The practice of standardizing the designation of time is a central device for coordinating activities and economic behaviors across individuals. However, there is nearly always conflict between an individual's goals of coordinating activities with others and engaging in those activities at their own preferred time. When time is standardized across large geographic areas, that tension is enhanced, because norms about the "clock times" of activities conflict with adapting to local environmental conditions created by natural or "solar" time. This tension is at the heart of current state and national debates about adopting daylight saving time or switching time zones. We study this conflict by examining how geographic and temporal variation in solar time within time zones affects the timing of a range of common behaviors in the United States. Specifically, we estimate the degree to which people shift their online behavior (through Twitter), their commute (using data from the Census), and their visits to businesses and other establishments (using foot traffic data). We find that, on average, a one-hour shift in the differential between solar time and clock time -- approximately the width of a time zone -- leads to shifting the clock time of behavior by between 9 and 26 minutes. This result shows that while adapting to local environmental factors significantly offsets the differential between solar time and clock time, the behavioral nudge and coordination value of clock time has the larger influence on activity. We also study how the trade-off differs across different activities and population demographics.
30999.zh_abstract: 标准化时间指定的做法是协调个体间活动和经济行为的核心机制。然而，个体与他人协调活动的目标与在自身偏好时间进行这些活动之间几乎总是存在冲突。当时间在广大地理区域内被标准化时，这种紧张关系会加剧，因为关于活动“时钟时间”的规范与适应由自然时间或“太阳时”创造的当地环境条件相冲突。这种紧张关系是当前关于采用夏令时或变更时区的州级和国家级辩论的核心。我们通过研究时区内太阳时的地理和时间变化如何影响美国一系列常见行为的时间安排来考察这种冲突。具体来说，我们估计了人们在多大程度上改变其在线行为（通过推特）、通勤（使用人口普查数据）以及访问商业和其他场所（使用人流量数据）的时间。我们发现，平均而言，太阳时与时钟时间之间的差异每偏移一小时——大约相当于一个时区的宽度——会导致行为时钟时间偏移9到26分钟。这一结果表明，虽然适应当地环境因素显著抵消了太阳时与时钟时间之间的差异，但时钟时间的行为助推和协调价值对活动具有更大的影响。我们还研究了这种权衡在不同活动和人口统计特征之间的差异。

30998.title: Restrict the Middleman? Quantitative Models of PBM Regulations and Their Consequences
30998.zh_title: 限制中间商？药品福利管理监管的量化模型及其后果
30998.abstract: This paper provides the first quantitative economic models of pharmacy benefit management regulation. The price-theoretic models allow for various market frictions and imperfections including market power, coordination costs, tax distortions, and incomplete innovation incentives. A rigorous economic interpretation is provided for what are sometimes called “rebate walls” or “rebate traps.” Applicable types of regulation include rebate rules, such as the HHS rebate rule and the Insulin Act; disclosure requirements such as the PBM Transparency Act of 2023; and pharmacy contract restrictions such as the CMS Medicare rule to take effect in 2024. Utilization of brands and generics, plan spending, cost sharing, spillovers to nonpharmacy medical spending, government budgets, and the pace of drug innovation are among the outcomes tracked by the open-source model.
30998.zh_abstract: 本文提供了首个药品福利管理监管的量化经济模型。这些价格理论模型考虑了多种市场摩擦和不完善之处，包括市场势力、协调成本、税收扭曲和不完全的创新激励。本文对有时被称为“回扣墙”或“回扣陷阱”的现象提供了严谨的经济学解释。适用的监管类型包括回扣规则（如HHS回扣规则和《胰岛素法案》）、披露要求（如2023年《药品福利管理透明度法案》）以及药房合同限制（如CMS将于2024年生效的医疗保险规则）。开源模型追踪的结果包括品牌药和仿制药的使用、计划支出、成本分摊、对非药房医疗支出的溢出效应、政府预算以及药物创新速度。
30998.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：D43, D71, I11, I13, L14, L51

30997.title: The Independent Contractor Workforce: New Evidence On Its Size and Composition and Ways to Improve Its Measurement in Household Surveys
30997.zh_title: 独立承包商劳动力：关于其规模和构成的新证据以及改进家庭调查测量的方法
30997.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, Brad Hershbein, Susan N. Houseman, Beth Truesdale
30997.abstract: Good data on the size and composition of the independent contractor workforce are elusive, with household survey and administrative tax data often disagreeing on levels and trends. We carried out a series of focus groups to learn how self-employed independent contractors speak about their work. Based on these findings, we designed and fielded a large-scale telephone survey to elicit more accurate and complete information on independent contractors, including those who may be coded incorrectly as employees in conventional household survey data and those who are independent contractors in a secondary work activity. We find that, upon probing, roughly one in 10 workers who initially reports working for an employer on one or more jobs (and thus is coded as an employee) is in fact an independent contractor on at least one of those jobs. Incorporating these miscoded workers into estimates of work arrangement on the main job nearly doubles the share who are independent contractors, to about 15 percent of all workers. Young workers, less-educated workers, workers of color, multiple-job holders, and those with low hours are more likely to be miscoded. Taking these workers into account substantively changes the demographic profile of the independent contractor workforce. Our research indicates that probing in household surveys to clarify a worker’s employment arrangement and identify all low-hours work is critical for accurately measuring independent contractor work.
30997.zh_abstract: 关于独立承包商劳动力规模和构成的可靠数据难以获取，家庭调查和行政税务数据在水平和趋势上常常不一致。我们进行了一系列焦点小组访谈，以了解自雇独立承包商如何描述他们的工作。基于这些发现，我们设计并实施了一项大规模电话调查，以获取关于独立承包商更准确和完整的信息，包括那些在传统家庭调查数据中可能被错误编码为雇员的人，以及那些在次要工作活动中是独立承包商的人。我们发现，经过深入询问，最初报告为受雇于一个或多个雇主（因此被编码为雇员）的工人中，约有十分之一实际上至少在其中一份工作中是独立承包商。将这些被错误编码的工人纳入主要工作安排的估计中，会使独立承包商的比例几乎翻倍，达到所有工人的约15%。年轻工人、受教育程度较低的工人、有色人种工人、多份工作者以及工作时间短的工人更有可能被错误编码。考虑这些工人会实质性地改变独立承包商劳动力的人口统计特征。我们的研究表明，在家庭调查中进行深入询问以澄清工人的就业安排并识别所有低工时工作，对于准确测量独立承包商工作至关重要。

30996.title: The Prices in the Crises: What We Are Learning from Twenty Years of Health Insurance in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
30996.zh_title: 危机中的价格：我们从低收入和中等收入国家二十年健康保险中学到了什么
30996.abstract: Governments in many low- and middle-income countries are developing health insurance products as a complement to tax-funded, subsidized provision of health care through publicly operated facilities. This paper discusses two rationales for this transition. First, health insurance would boost fiscal revenues for health care, as post-treatment out-of-pocket payments to providers would be replaced by pre-treatment insurance premia to health ministries. Second, increased patient choice and carefully designed physician reimbursements would increase quality in the health care sector. This essay shows that, at best, these objectives have only been partially met. Despite evidence that health insurance has provided financial protection, consumers are not willing to pay for unsubsidized premia. Health outcomes have not improved despite an increase in utilization. We argue that this is not because there was no room to improve the quality of care but because behavioral responses among health care providers have systematically undermined the objectives of these insurance schemes.
30996.zh_abstract: 许多低收入和中等收入国家的政府正在开发健康保险产品，作为通过公共运营机构提供税收资助、补贴医疗服务的补充。本文讨论了这一转变的两个理由。首先，健康保险将增加医疗保健的财政收入，因为治疗后的自付费用将被治疗前向卫生部门支付的保险费所取代。其次，增加患者选择和精心设计的医生报销方式将提高医疗保健部门的质量。本文表明，这些目标充其量只是部分实现。尽管有证据表明健康保险提供了财务保护，但消费者不愿意为未补贴的保费付费。尽管利用率有所增加，但健康结果并未改善。我们认为，这并不是因为没有改善护理质量的空间，而是因为医疗服务提供者的行为反应系统地破坏了这些保险计划的目标。
30996.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I11, I12, I13, I15, O12

30995.title: Taking Teacher Evaluation to Scale: The Effect of State Reforms on Achievement and Attainment
30995.zh_title: 将教师评价推广至全国：州级改革对学业成就和升学率的影响
30995.authors: Joshua Bleiberg, Eric Brunner, Erica Harbatkin, Matthew A. Kraft, Matthew G. Springer
30995.abstract: Federal incentives and requirements under the Obama administration spurred states to adopt major reforms to their teacher evaluation systems. We examine the effects of these reforms on student achievement and attainment at a national scale by exploiting the staggered timing of implementation across states. We find precisely estimated null effects, on average, that rule out impacts as small as 0.015 standard deviation for achievement and 1 percentage point for high school graduation and college enrollment. We also find little evidence that the effect of teacher evaluation reforms varied by system design rigor, specific design features or student and district characteristics. We highlight five factors that may have undercut the efficacy of teacher evaluation reforms at scale: political opposition, the decentralized structure of U.S. public education, capacity constraints, limited generalizability, and the lack of increased teacher compensation to offset the non-pecuniary costs of lower job satisfaction and security.
30995.zh_abstract: 奥巴马政府时期的联邦激励和要求促使各州对其教师评价体系进行重大改革。我们利用各州实施改革的时间差异，在全国范围内考察了这些改革对学生学业成就和升学率的影响。我们发现，平均而言，精确估计的零效应排除了对学业成就影响小至0.015个标准差以及对高中毕业率和大学入学率影响小至1个百分点的情况。我们也几乎没有发现证据表明教师评价改革的效果因系统设计严谨性、具体设计特征或学生及地区特征而异。我们强调了五个可能削弱教师评价改革大规模有效性的因素：政治反对、美国公共教育的分散结构、能力限制、有限的可推广性，以及缺乏增加教师薪酬以抵消因工作满意度和安全感降低而产生的非金钱成本。

30994.title: The US, Economic News, and the Global Financial Cycle
30994.zh_title: 美国、经济新闻与全球金融周期
30994.authors: Christoph E. Boehm, T. Niklas Kroner
30994.abstract: We provide evidence for a causal link between the US economy and the global financial cycle. Using intraday data, we show that US macroeconomic news releases have large and significant effects on global risky asset prices. Stock price indexes of 27 countries, the VIX, and commodity prices all jump instantaneously upon news releases. The responses of stock indexes co-move across countries and are large—often comparable in size to the response of the S&P 500. Further, US macroeconomic news explains on average 23 percent of the quarterly variation in foreign stock markets. The joint behavior of stock prices, bond yields, and risk premia suggests that systematic US monetary policy reactions to news do not drive the estimated effects. Instead, the evidence points to a direct effect on investors’ risk-taking capacity. Our findings show that a byproduct of the United States' central position in the global financial system is that news about its business cycle has large effects on global financial conditions.
30994.zh_abstract: 我们提供了美国经济与全球金融周期之间存在因果关系的证据。利用日内数据，我们表明美国宏观经济新闻发布对全球风险资产价格具有显著且重大的影响。27个国家的股票价格指数、VIX指数以及大宗商品价格在新闻发布时均会瞬间跳升。股票指数的反应在各国间共同波动，且幅度巨大——通常与标普500指数的反应规模相当。此外，美国宏观经济新闻平均解释了外国股票市场季度变动的23%。股票价格、债券收益率和风险溢价的联合行为表明，系统性的美国货币政策对新闻的反应并非驱动这些估计效应的原因。相反，证据指向了对投资者风险承担能力的直接影响。我们的发现表明，美国在全球金融体系中的核心地位的一个副产品是，关于其商业周期的新闻对全球金融状况具有重大影响。
30994.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, F40, G12, G14, G15

30982.title: Inflation and Asset Returns
30982.abstract: The past half-century has seen major shifts in inflation expectations, how inflation comoves with the business cycle, and how stocks comove with Treasury bonds. Against this backdrop, we review the economic channels and empirical evidence on how inflation is priced in financial markets. Not all inflation episodes are created equal. Using in a New Keynesian model, we show how “good” inflation can be linked to demand shocks and “bad” inflation to supply shocks driving the economy. We then discuss asset pricing implications of “good” and “bad” inflation. We conclude by providing an outlook for inflation risk premia in the world of newly rising inflation.
30982.zh_abstract: 过去半个世纪见证了通胀预期、通胀与商业周期联动方式以及股票与国债联动方式的重大转变。在此背景下，我们回顾了通胀如何在金融市场中被定价的经济学渠道和实证证据。并非所有的通胀事件都是相同的。我们利用新凯恩斯主义模型，展示了“好”通胀如何与需求冲击相关联，以及“坏”通胀如何与驱动经济的供给冲击相关联。然后，我们讨论了“好”通胀和“坏”通胀的资产定价含义。最后，我们展望了在新一轮通胀上升的世界中通胀风险溢价的前景。
